description: Under app details, adding a field for notes to help show what this app is for and what it does so everyone has context externally and internally. This would also be very helpful for turnover.
workaround: None that I'm aware of, just hope that the title is descriptive enough or that the right people are still around internally and externally to explain the specific app in developer console

summary: Limit User Management Access based on Role/Scope
description: We'd love the ability to give our client's mid\-level manager users the ability to add and provision other users into their Yext account, but ideally those mid\-level managers should **not** be able to assign new users permissions to access content outside of the scope that their manager has access to. As it stands now, any user that has permission to manage users can create new users with any level of account access.
workaround: The current work around would be to only provide user management access to account admins, but this isn't feasible at scale.

summary: Allow Personal Settings to be set by SSO Users
description: Yext users who are configured to access the platform via SSO lose access to various personal settings (including setting a display language and preferred email language). It would be great if we could allow these users access to these settings, as it's not uncommon for bilingual users to access the platform, and if these users are configured to access their accounts via SSO, they are locked in to using whatever language is set in via their IdP. This also then leads to massive overhead where an IdP admin now has to collect and manage this information for all users. If we could allow these users to set these settings themselves in Yext, that would be a much better experience for users!
workaround: No current workarounds as far as I am aware.

summary: Add separate brand logos in different areas of the KG
description: Our brand logo is black and since the dashboard in the KG is also black our logo isn't displaying correctly. We could switch our logo color to white, but since all the other backgrounds in Yext are white, these wouldn't display correctly either. We would like the option to choose which logo displays depending on which section of the KG it will be displayed on or to be able to change the theme of the dashboard from black to white.
workaround: No workaround available.

summary: License History - Entity Level
description: Hi! It would be great if in the activity log or entity history screen it was really simple to determine license history. Often I want to look at some of the use cases below and it's quite difficult to find:    * When was a license added/removed to a certain entity / entities    * How many licenses have I assigned/unassigned over xyz time frame    * Within a label or folder, how many licenses have I assigned over xyz period and when
workaround: NA

summary: User History
description: See the history of a User such as when they were created, who/what created their user, when they gained access and history of previous access including if their access to specific entities has changed
workaround: NA

summary: Cancel Scheduled License Unassignment for Subset of Entities
description: Scheduling License Unassignment is very helpful. However, if you schedule the unassignment for multiple entities, once the unassignment is scheduled, all of the entities are "grouped" together. There is no way to cancel the scheduled license unassignment for a subset of the entities that are scheduled.
workaround: Currently, there are two workarounds:    1. Cancel the unassignment and reschedule the unassignment for the entities that should have licenses unassigned     * This can work if the group of entities is relatively small (\<10)     * However, if the group is large (dozens or hundreds) \- there isn't an ideal way to identify all of the entities that are in the unassignment action     * There isn't a capability to export scheduled updates and see which entities are scheduled to have their licenses unassigned and on which particular date     * Because this is a manual task \- the risk of doing this is missing to reschedule a license unassignment for entities     * In addition, if you have hundreds of entities in the license reassignment group, how can I identify all of those entities efficiently (manually would take to long)    2. Make a note of the entities that should keep licenses and the date the licenses are scheduled to be unassigned     * On this date, add the licenses back to the entities     * This can be efficient if you utilize labels and the unassignment dates are all the same     * However, if there are a lot of different combinations of entities, which licenses they should have, and which date they are being remove \- this can become difficult to keep track of     * In addition, this is a manual task that you have to remember to do. If you forget to return and add the licenses back, the entities will be missing the licenses indefinitely

summary: Licences by brand
description: Hi team,    Can we please make add to the license pack UI something for description/notes to make assignment more manageable for multi\-brand accounts?
workaround: Currently this is done within the client article but is subject to human error/oversight, and also doesn't allow client vis. It also isn't conducive to SSEA

summary: Improvements on the in platform support ticket dashboard
description: Hi team,    I've had a request from a client for the support ticket dashboard to include a couple of extra features:    1) Can we add filtering by region / country? This is a global account with a high ticket volume and so they'd love to be able to better segment the tickets    2) They would also love to be able to add a deadline feature \- i.e. to help them prioritise which have the most important internal deadline. This would be different to the current way of filtering just based on when the ticket was raised, but not in line with anything like new loc open date etc to help better understand the priority tickets and internal timeframes.    Thanks in advance for your thoughts!
workaround: NA

summary: Out of Licenses Banner
description: A banner, similar to the capacity usage banner should appear when a client is low or out of licenses.    Additionally, it may also be helpful for clients with higher ACV to have a notification flagged to the CSM/AE when this banner is flagged on an account so they could review and determine if outreach is needed.
workaround: N/A

summary: Enforce Account-Wide Login Settings (SSO vs. username / password)
description: It would be helpful for certain clients if Yext (or client\-side admins) were able to set an account rule that removed the ability to select or update login settings. E.g. if a client wants to ensure that all users are set up to log in via SAML SSO, including new users created in\-platform, admins should be able to turn off the ability to set "Is SAML User" to "no".
workaround: Current workarounds include:    * bulk upload via spreadsheet    * user creation via API    * user creation via JIT Provisioning in SAML    * limiting user\-creation permissions

summary: Filter for a specific entity in the license history
description: It's hard to filter the entity list for a specific entity in the license history [https://www.yext.com/s/xxxxx/account/subscriptions/licenseHistory](https://www.yext.com/s/xxxxx/account/subscriptions/licenseHistory). It's also not possible to use the shortcut of the standard browser search \[CRL\]+\[f\].
workaround: Long and slow scrolling through the list with \>5k entities.

summary: In-Platform Notifications for Support Tickets
description: With the integration of support tickets into Yext, and the addition of in\-platform notifications, can we tie these two areas together? It would be incredible if clients can receive in\-platform notifications when support and professional services reply to tickets. From the notification, they would be sent to the support tickets section, and easily be able to navigate to the ticket via the provided link.    Currently, clients can only see when tickets are responded to via email, so this would be an incredible update! There are many times I will reach out to clients about tickets requiring their input, and they are not aware of them.
workaround: Currently, clients are only notified of ticket updates via email, and this is inconsistent.

summary: Additional Platform Usage Details for Accounts with Multiple Search Experiences/Pages
description: For accounts with multiple search experiences and/or multiple sites (i.e. unique domains/subdomains) it is difficult to check the usage by each experience. The current 'Platform Usage' module in 'Account Settings' only shows aggregate usage of Page Views and Search capacity, and does not provide details into what percentage of the total each experience/site is utilizing.    For organizations with search experiences or pages for distinct use cases and/or multiple sub\-organizations these types of details can be important for account administration and internal charge\-back/budgeting processes.
workaround: Reports can be run via Analytics.

summary: Add More Explicit Page Titles to Yext Platform
description: As an extensive user of various pieces of the Yext Platform, I often have a number of Yext Platform webpages open at a time, I would love if those Pages had more informative page titles so it was easier to navigate back and forth.    For example if I have a the *Deploys Page* Open for my Yext Pages website called *Marketing Site***.** At the moment My Yext Platform Page title just says **Sites** however it would be nice if it said something along the lines of "**Deploys \- Marketing Site**". If I have the Entity Edit Screen open for a Single Event Entity it just says **Entities** in the Page title, however it would be helpful if it says "**\[Event Title\] Edit \- Entities**" This would make navigating among tabs much easier especially if I'm working on Multiple Entities or Multiple Pages
workaround: There is no work around, you have to click around to find the right the page you want

summary: Exporting Data Across Sub-accounts
description: Functionality /tool to be able to export the data across different subaccounts under a parent account within the platform
workaround: 1. Data pulls through writing queries/scripts in sql / python    2. For a small number of sub\-accounts, this data can be pulled via API. For larger sub\-accounts (eg. partners) it is not scalable to pull this data via API as in order to pull location data for a subaccount, you need specify the subaccount ID rather than the the parent account ID.

summary: Allow Account Admins to "Log-in as User"
description: It would be cool to be able to log\-in as a specific user, as an account Admin. When testing out new roles/permissions, I want to confirm how my updates look for specific users. Right now, I believe this is an internal\-only feature.
workaround: NA

summary: Yext CLI Automatic Account Switching
description: I'm working on pages sites connected to a bunch of different accounts. Needing to run `yext init` every time I switch between projects isn't fun, I either have to look up the business id every time I do it or scroll the list of saved credentials which is pretty long.    It would be nice if we supported something like a .yextrc file that could automatically authenticate me with the correct account for operations performed within that directory. This is inspired by .nvmrc files which automatically switch users to the right nodeJS version when changing projects.
workaround: Manually re\-auth when switching projects.

summary: Adjust UI and Launch Process for Requesting Licenses More than Once
description: Customers are able to submit a request for licenses directly from the Knowledge Graph. This in turn creates a support ticket where a Yext employee will then apply licenses and complete any follow\-up steps (launch Listings, ensure Pages are live, etc.). However, licenses can be requested multiple times for the same location which can create multiple tickets for the same request.    We should alert users when the same licenses have already been requested for a location and ensure all information regarding multiple requests stays in one ticket. This will create a cleaner process for both Yext and the customer.
workaround: Currently, we will merge tickets and inform customers when we have multiple requests.

summary: Filter by users who have never logged in
description: Hi team    Can we please consider adding to our user filters to understand the users who have never logged into Yext?    Client feedback below (they have over 900 users)    *One thing I want to do is to filter users who have never logged in and delete them. We can then send another round of comms. out across our network and ask people if they need access to identify themselves and we'll add them…I don't want user licenses being taken up by people who have no intention of ever logging in / using the platform.*    *When I go to the user management UI, I can set a filter to identify people who 'have' logged in, and set dates etc. to show when last logged in (before, after, on or between specified dates etc.).*    *But how do I filter to show people who have never logged in? Apologies if that sounds like a stupid question, it just didn't seem obvious to me.*
workaround: No way to get this directly in Yext. Workaround is to export all users and filter in Excel

summary: User Role | Limit entity access at parent level (Partner portal)
description: Hi,   I received the below e\-mail. The partner would like the ability to create a user at the parent level, which would only grant access to certain sub\-accounts/locations.
workaround: Currently to fulfill what they are asking for they would need to create a user for each sub\-account for each customer. Creating users at the parent level only allows for all sub\-accounts.

summary: Help link for Partner instead of Yext help site or Hitchhikers
description: To add ability on Partner Portal or Partner Dashboard switching links from Yext help site/HH to partner own help site.
workaround: When partner use iFlame, Yext white label for their dashboard for users, sometimes they see Yext help site link or HH link. From users point of view, it is confusing. If partners can change the links from HH or Yext help site to Partner own help site, it create better experience for users.

summary: Add Search Bar back to Listings
description: Hello! Could we explore adding the search bar back to the listings tab ([screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/Tfk2aLs.png)). This was previously available in the old Listings experience and made it much easier to search for Listings statuses for specific entities \- such as by entity name or Yext ID.
workaround: The current workaround is to use the filtering functionality and adding the field as a dimension. However, I don't believe there is an option to search by Yext ID; you can only search by Entity ID in the "All Entities" interface.

summary: Control the order in which inputs are shown when an app is being installed
description: At the moment, it seems that the order in which inputs appear when someone goes to install an app is alphabetical. It would be great to be able to control the order in which these inputs are shown when the app is being installed.   This would help avoid potentially confusing user experiences like the example shown below, where a "Password" input is coming before a "Username" input.  ![](https://a.mktgcdn.com/p\-sandbox/H7t2zvIHB1jusI93zJ58gD55K8eV5gWgYkqyQaWJ2oA/original)
workaround: not aware of any workarounds

summary: Add Ability to set Roles with Permissions to edit and create Specific Entities
description: I would like the ability to add permissions for a user or role to update or edit all entities of a specific type.    For example I have a Stat Entity in my KG that I would like a team to have access to create, update and delete only those entities
workaround: Currently I am creating a template to add those Entities to a Folder and scoping the Users permissions to that folder instead

summary: Add a ‘Help’ section to the Platform UI (Left) Navigation Menu
description: It would be nice to include a proper Help section in the navigation menu instead of just having a question mark icon in the bottom left hand corner. The Help nav menu could simply include links to help.yext.com, hitchhikers.Yext.com, and the submit request form on help.Yext.com Ideally, there might be a separate page within the Platform UI with the Answers Search bar and verticals for Help and Hitchhhikers along with the embedded form to submit a support request.
workaround: Navigate to help.Yext.com

summary: Cancellation from Portal is limited to 10 locations per subaccount
description: When a partner using Portal has a customer with more than 10 locations, Yext add ability that they cancel the licences from the sub\-account's KG without limitation or with more locations
workaround: Some partners using portal have more than 10 locations in a single sub\-account. When they want to manipulate licence packages of them, the portal only list the first 10 locations. Therefore, the partner can't modify the package assignment in bulk.

summary: Explanation of what permissions are needed for different webhook types
description: When creating a webhook the first screen prompts you with a list of different webhook types to select from. By default most of these are disabled, but there's not a description of why they're disabled.    I think it would be helpful to add some general help text to let the user know that the available webhook triggers depend on the API endpoints that the App has access to. Then for particular types (maybe on hover?) it would be nice if they indicated exactly which endpoint you need.    It's possible to figure out that the hooks depend on the API permissions, but it's still hard to know exactly what you need. For example, for the "Q\&A" webhook do I need "Knowledge API \> Q\&A", "Knowledge API \> Q\&A Submission", or "Live API \> Q\&A"? Do I need the read\-only or read\-write version of each of those?
workaround: Trial and error.

summary: Some way to identify webhook type after creation
description: After creating a webhook, there's no way to tell what type (Entities, Menus, Bios, Q\&A, etc.) it is. I think this would be useful information to have somewhere on the webhook list or edit pages.
workaround: You can use "View Sample Request" and possibly tell from there, if you're familiar with what the different requests look like.

summary: CaC Support for Webhooks
description: I'd like to use Config as Code to configure webhooks.    I have some webhook plugins that I think will be useful across a lot of accounts, and I'd like to set up some CaC resources to allow them to easily be applied anywhere, currently that's not possible.
workaround: Manually configure webhook.

summary: Custom Favorites
description: The new favorites are awesome! It'd be great to favorite any view within a part of the platform though \- say, for instance, not only the "Entities" view within KG, but specifically the "Healthcare Professionals" entities view specifically. It seems like the favorites are restricted to views that can navigated to with one click off the left toolbar; why can't we expand it to favorite any sub\-view that is 1 or 2 clicks beyond what clicking on the left toolbar can get you?
workaround: Lots of redundant clicking.

summary: Two factor oauth (2FA)
description: Hey,    I was wondering if 2 factor authentication for users in Yext is an item on the roadmap? If not, can this be an item to be considered for in the future?
workaround: N/A

summary: List favorites on YEXT homepage to have quick link
description: With the change of the YEXT homepage it would be great to have the "favorites" marked in the menu shown as quick links on the homepage. This way access to the most used pages is even faster.
workaround: Open the menu, click open the area and then click on the responsible page.

summary: Role concept in a global context with one account
description: Our situation: We have a global account, but different countries uploads their data.    The countries use their own logins, but some of the menu items are disabled (i.e. "Templates", "Assets",..), because they should not see and edit content or assets of other countries.    What we need was a better role concept in a global context.    Note: All areas are affected: Listings, Pages, KG, Reviews,...
workaround: When a change or upload is neccesary a person with global permission is needed to do that. As example the asset will be uploaded and renamed to a special nomenclature, so that the country user can find the correct asset.

summary: Portal Customers Tab Enhancement
description: I'm logging this on my partners' behalf. Several of them have requested for the same improvements:    Adding publisher suggestions field to show how many suggestions are available to manage as partners don't need to check in each sub\-accounts.    Adding ability to sort potential duplicates by date they occur (and the same for suggestions if the above is realised) for partners to take actions without browsing through the list.
workaround: n/a

summary: Mobile Friendly Content Capture
description: Our partners love the concept of content capture. Nonetheless, for SMB business owners, they would like to complete tasks on mobile devices rather than turning on PC and work on it. As such, a number of partners requested content capture UI to be mobile optimised.
workaround: end\-users can still use the current desktop UI on mobile device.

summary: Add "Unsubscribe" or "Edit email frequency" option to saved automtaed exports
description: Currently, when an account no longer has services, User access is removed from the platform. However, this does not stop recipients of automated email exports from continuing to receive emails.
workaround: Contacting Yext Support to disable automated export.

summary: Content Capture URL generation at entity level in Portal
description: Currently, partners who use the Portal do not have a capability to generate content capture URLs per entity, but sub\-account basis.  As a consequence, when a partner acquires a new customer with more than one location, the generated URL will change facts of all the entities in the Knowledge Graph of the sub\-account the generated URL is associated with. It leads to problems such as 1) the partner has to employ a unique fulfilment and support procedure for these customers; and 2) accidental data updates by false error.
workaround: We have an API endpoint, but not all partners are as technical, or familiar with REST API. If the partner uses Enhanced Dashboard to manage all locations, the entity based Content Capture URL is attainable in the Knowledge Graph. This is only missing in Portal.

summary: User access role, features segmentation
description: I am working with a client in their user management flow. Their security team has requested a specific integration that will prevent specific platform behavior.    To do so, we need to enable a user role, that is able to:    * access the user's section    * access every single user    * be able to change the "Scope"    But NOT be able to:    * Delete the user    * Change the role assigned to the user
workaround: Not possible

summary: Knowledge Graph Optimization Progress Bar
description: Love the optimization progress bar, but I would like to be able to sort by lowest percentage / highest percentage score.
workaround: I dont think there is one

summary: Platform Dark Mode
description: The knowledge graph background has a lot of white color on it. As someone who uses their desktop all day, I have many of my applications set to dark mode. It would be a much better user experience to allow dark mode to be applied to the knowledge graph.
workaround: external plug\-ins on browser.

summary: Knowledge Graph Entity Subscription & Feature Pack History
description: **Idea**:  Adding the ability for customers to see licenses assignment/unassignment dates in activity tracker or historical export functionality.  **Use case:**  **F**or customers that cycle through a limited number of event licenses, being able to see assignment and unassignment dates would allow them to improve their workflow and verify dates. This would give customers more transparency on launch dates, or closed store strategy improvements. This would allow customers to QA and troubleshoot their addition/removal process. This would also reduce the amount of support tickets generated for this information
workaround: Currently, customers can submit a ticket to Platform Services for a data pull regarding assignment \& unassignment dates. Customers can also submit a ticket to Platform Services, who then escalates to Eng, for feature pack assignment \& unassignment.

summary: Onboarding
description: Sending an on\-boarding token/url directly from yext to someones email.  For example Facebook page is not connected. Go to Yext optimization bar and send a link directly to this certain company social media manager´s email to finish linking the account.  Would be great if this was possible in bulk also.    If I have 20 something companies with one location and they all have not linked Google Business profile, I would be able to send out a notification to all users connected with these entities, for example "please connect your Google business, here´s a link to do it"
workaround: NA

summary: Export Service Additions and Cancellations
description: It would be great if there was an option in the dashboard to export a list of Service Additions and Cancellations. For agencies this would mean we would be able to export a list of new clients and cancelled clients.
workaround: No workaround available

summary: Partner Whitelabel UI - Yext as a name still appears
description: When downloading either all locations from the KG, or downloading all available users for an account, the download csv always shows "yext" somewhere. The location export shows "yext ID" in the export flow. The user export is called "yextusers" Ideally, it would just state Partner ID / PartnerUsers. This impacts any partner / portal or dashboard user.    Additionally we see "waiting for yext" when going through the GMB optimization process.    1. in CSV download, we show the "YextID".    2. in the user export, the filename is "YextUsers"    3. during GMB optimization process, we show "waiting for yext"    Is there a possibility we change that to the partner name?
workaround: None at the moment. The End customer is seeing the Yext name.

summary: App Setup Flow - Have Tooltips
description: In our app setup flow \- it would be great to have tool tips available for fields that need to be filled out. For example, when installing the new GBP connector app \- there is a page for entering the Linked Account ID and Location Group ID. There are no clear instructions on that page on where to grab that information. Tool tips would allow further information for the user to understand how to fill those fields in.    See screenshot here [https://www.screencast.com/t/a8RnX1kC](https://www.screencast.com/t/a8RnX1kC) \- as an example.
workaround: Today you just need to know a bit more nuanced detail around where to grab information when installing the GBP app.

summary: Install an App More Than Once from the App Directory
description: I would like to be able to install apps from the App Directory more than once. For example, when I install the Slack Public Content Connector I can only authenticate it into one of my Slack workspaces. We have a few Slack workspaces that I can authenticate into so I have to do custom work in Slack to make sure all of my data is available in that workspace. It would be nice if I could reinstall the app and authenticate into another workspace. This same idea exists for many other apps in the app directory. Thank you!
workaround: Do custom work in the source where I am integrating with. For some of the data connector apps I can duplicate the connector in the Connector screen, make changes to it and run it again.

summary: Privately Distributed App Directory Apps
description: I would like to create an App Directory app that's available for use in multiple unrelated accounts, but isn't publicly available to all accounts.    As a developer in a consulting group, I work with lots of unrelated accounts. There are common patterns and workflows that I'd like to capture in an App for our developers, but I don't want it to be publicly visible and thus be obligated to provide external support for it.
workaround: Make the App public and deal with the overhead of support. For CaC only apps I can make a Github repo and apply directly from there using Admin Console, but it's a little less convenient and configuration isn't as nice.

summary: Add a way for app developers to send notifications
description: Currently if something goes wrong and needs user attention, such as expired account credentials that need to be refreshed, there is no way to get the user's attention. It would be nice to be able to send a notification to the in platform notification system via an api when the user needed to take action to address an issue. This would also be useful to notify users of new features that have been added since they first installed the app or provide other relevant information (ie X number of your entities were updated via this app in the last week)
workaround: App developers can provide this information once the app is launched, however it requires the user to open up the app proactively. Without a notification users need to first detect that there is an issue on their own.

summary: Indicate Source of Update in Streams Webhooks
description: In Entities webhook we're able to know who made the update (user, API, yext system). It would be great if we could see the same thing in the Streams webhook. It would also be great to know if it was a user that updated it the uesr's email associated with the update.
workaround: NA

summary: API integration alerting
description: I have apps that are utilizing your APIs but I'm having trouble setting up monitoring and alerting on my end to understand runs, errors, failures, outages, etc. Do you have any best practices in this area that I can follow? Guidance, tools/systems, and documentation for how I can utilize your APIs to set up my own monitoring and alerting would be super helpful! Thanks for considering!
workaround: I don't have any monitoring or alerting today, so I have to get help from either the Yext team or my IT team. But Yext doesn't have much visibility into my client\-side integrations and working with my IT team is challenging, so I'd love to provide them some more guidance!

summary: Knowledge Tags in Live API - Platform Usage Tab
description: The Developer Support Team sees a number of clients that are unknowingly exceeding their Live API Usage capacity because they have installed Knowledge Tags on their pages. Currently, in the dashboard, there is no delineation between how the Live API is being used between Live API endpoints that can be seen in the Developer Console and in our Hitchhikers Documentation and the Knowledge Tags API.    It would be extremely helpful if clients were able to see what is affecting their Live API usage more clearly between Knowledge Tags and the other general Live API endpoints within the Yext dashboard. More clarity on how Knowledge Tags can affect their Live API quota would also be beneficial\- as clients seem to occasionally post the script tag throughout all of their web pages without understanding how this is affecting their Live API capacity.
workaround: No real workaround at the moment\- our team is usually alerted to these problems after they've already happened from CSMs or the client.

summary: Having a link to the actual post in the Posts API
description: When we get or list posts in the Post API, we don't have a direct URL to the post. This would be very helpful.    \- We could show the client the URL so that he can visit the post.    \- We could show it as descriptive data to refer to the post in tables or lists on the screen.    For example, to display a table of metrics for each post. You could simply display a table with:    URL \| VISITS \| LIKES \| CLICKS
workaround: Currently, for the client to know which post we are referring to, it is necessary to show him the full text/content of the post. Since an identifier is not a descriptive data for the client.

summary: Send Welcome Email When User Is Created Via The API
description: When a user is created via the API with no PW in the payload, a welcome email is sent to the email specified for the user to create a PW.
workaround: At the moment you can create a user via the API with no password specified but the system does not send a welcome email once the user is created. Currently, it seems like the only way to set a PW would be directly in the Yext dashboard (User Settings) or the adjustment is made internally on the Yext side.

summary: Ability to link via SSO directly to a single location/entity
description: It would be great to be able to link via SSO directly to a specific location/entity. And then also offer the ability to connect directly to a specific location/entity view of that section of our platform. For example a location/entity view of Knowledge Graph, Listings or Reviews. We would need the nav param to have the ability to use an external entity id as this would be a Partner's customer facing view.
workaround: None

summary: Yext Business ID in the API
description: We'd love the ability to pull the Business ID via API. This could be used for a myriad of different reasons for different partners. Namely, for our company, we'd love to be able to allow our internal teams to one\-click directly to our client's profile in Yext from our CRM, but would need the ID to pull to populate in the link: [yext.com/s/\[Yext](http://yext.com/s/%5BYext) Customer ID\].
workaround: Continue to access the profile manually through Yext by looking up the location and managing the account.

summary: Provide Duplicate Ownership Details in API Response for Rejected Add Requests
description: When a Reseller Partner submits a customer order through the API, sometimes the order is rejected as duplicate customer of an existing account (i.e. it shares a similar NAP to another account in Yext).    When an order is rejected, there is no detail provided in the API response that indicates who the duplicate belongs to (e.g. a Yext direct customer, another Yext Partner, or another customer within the Partner's own account).    Having this basic detail (without disclosing the name of the account owner) would allow Partners' fulfilment teams to better determine how to follow up with the customer.
workaround: Currently, each time an order is rejected, the Partner must write into Yext Support with the accompanying Add Request ID and the Support team must look up the details of the duplicate.    Returning this information in the API would lessen the support burden on both Partners' support teams and Yext Support.

summary: To be able to set the contact time for notifications.
description: The customer want to set the contact time for notifications.    For example, the customer set the analytics notifications weekly.    The customer get the email at the evening.    If they can set the email timing, it will be easier to use.    or    Set the notification time according to their time zone.
workaround: No workaround for now.

summary: Directory Manager UI to show Entity Type and Saved Filter ID
description: Currently, we have to open and edit the Directory Manager JSON file to see all the settings.    It would be convenient if we can see the Entity Type and the Saved Filter ID without opening the JSON file.
workaround: NA

summary: Request for more editing abilities in Pages product
description: Hi I have a request from my partner, they've run into an issue with not being able to edit the color of the text in a back button. This conflicts with the background color of the page they've published, and makes the back button not readable. There are also some elements in Page Builder where they would like control of the text and the translations in Estonian and Latvian.
workaround: None available for configuring the text color in the back button of the widget.

summary: Show URLs for Unique Pages on Pages Insight Tab
description: When an admin selects the "Live Pages" on an entity, the user is redirected to the Pages Insight page filtered to the pages specific to that entity, however there is no indication of which pages/URLs are associated with that entity and no path to toggle them.    It would be helpful to list the specific url(s) associated with that entity and provide easier abilities to view or preview the associated page(s).
workaround: N/A

summary: Temporarily pause data updates to pages
description: It would be great if there was a way to temporarily pause automatic data updates to a site, to prevent updates from going live while they're still in progress.    For example, I recently had to add an additional level to a live directory, causing the root\-level directory links page to break while the directory manager finished running/ while I was testing the front\-end changes on staging. I would like to have been able to pause data updates temporarily during this so that there would be no downtime on the root directory page during the change.
workaround: The best workaround I found was setting up a sandbox account to test my changes in to ensure that there would be no issues that would prolong the downtime during these changes.

summary: A Pages template repo for with a far broader set of template which are continuously optimised by Yext
description: Hi HH Community    It has been fed back that it would be beneficial for the current "out of the box" Pages templates repo to be far broader in terms of template themes/verticals. This, along with a wider set of React components to leverage. All the above to be continuously optimised for SEO and other performance aspects.
workaround: Build on current templates and adapt as required. This is time consuming compared to having a wider set of templates available which are optimised accordingly aligned to Yext Product updates and SEO algo changes from leading search engines

summary: Locator Map Pins Connecting to Results Cards
description: When a search on a React Locator is conducted, make it so that clicking a pin triggers some interaction with the corresponding result card. Currently the pins don't have any interactivity. It would be nice to be able to pass some kind of click/hover handler to the map/pin component.
workaround: NA

summary: Pages 2.0 to have Queue information if there are any long queues causing delays in Deploy/Page Gen/Data Update
description: When there is a prioritised data update happening in the Platform, there is no way to check if delays are to be expected in Pages Deploy processes.
workaround: Ask Pages SME about the issue.

summary: Functionality: Add redirects to Site via the Deploy URLs page in Deploy Details
description: Per[this reference page](https://hitchhikers.yext.com/docs/pages/redirects/?target=view\-active\-redirects\-in\-the\-platform), it is possible to view a Page's redirects by clicking View Deploy URLs in a Deploy Details page. This takes users to a Deploy URLs page with a Live Pages tab and a **Redirects** tab. This tab displays any redirected URLs, both source and destination. However, it's read\-only. It would be very helpful to be able to add redirects directly to this page. This is especially helpful for clients who close a location and want to remove the page but have no 404 page. While automatic redirects occur when slug changes occur, there is no default automatic redirect behavior built into Consulting pages.
workaround: Currently, the best workaround is to manually add the redirect either via template or csv file. Either option requires some coding knowledge.

summary: Directory Manager to be able to skip Slugs
description: Currently, we can only assign slugs to the parent entities based on fields in the base entity.    We want to be able to use slug manager (or any custom function) to assign slugs to the parent entities.    Ask: make slugs a non\-required key in the Directory Manager JSON file.
workaround: Run a connector after each DM run.

summary: Only Allowed IPs Can Access to the Page
description: Sometimes, clients request Yext to restrict access to Yext STG pages only for authorized IPs.    Currently, only basic authentication can be configured for STG pages, but we are unable to restrict access based on IPs.    As a result of this limitation, some clients are concerned that individuals who have left the company could still access the STG page since they are aware of the ID/PWD.    To address this concern, implementing a system to allow only approved IP addresses is a viable solution.
workaround: Change ID/PWD periodically

summary: Pages Staging Area
description: 1) Would be great to have a Pages Test Environment that could be used to test the look and feel of something before it is pushed to production. Today Yext can do this internally and then put something in staging, but external parties are not able to do this.    2) Would be nice to have a button that got you there from each individual entity so you could easily access the Pages in Staging and in Production.
workaround: NA

summary: Page Builder - Configure Person List
description: It would be nice to be able to further customize the "Person List" module in Page Builder. For example, I want to add NMLS numbers, but I have to use the Details list item and then it displays as "Details: 1021238" and I cannot change the label to say NMLS instead of Details. I cannot remove the "Phone" label before the phone number. I cannot arrange the list items, like if I want to list Phone Number before Address. The CTA Text cannot map to email address. I'd also like to see a couple more customizable list items that I can map to custom fields.
workaround: NA

summary: Add "Entity Picker" to Studio
description: Currently Studio selects and displays a single entity for the entity type associated with a given template. Would be helpful to have an option for selecting which entity you'd like to display in the editor since content can vary entity to entity.
workaround: N/A

summary: To complete the “endDate”: “startDate”: fields with the Field Reference.
description: In our project the Event pages are evergreen, so we keep them for long periods of time even if the event has ended. This allows us to accumulate SEO authority on the pages and reuse them every time the event is repeated.    The problem is that the Event \> date field marks the end of the page: When the end date arrives, the page is automatically deleted.    We are currently cheating the situation by marking a false end date (e.g. year 2030).    By doing this, the JSON data markup is incorrect because it picks up the fake date and that is a problem.    We are trying to make a Custom Schema Markup mapping the date to a different field of Event / date \& time but we have tried fields of text, date, etc … **and we do not get that none of these fields is available in the Field Reference.**
workaround: We are currently cheating the situation by marking a false end date (e.g. year 2030).    By doing this, the JSON data markup is incorrect because it picks up the fake date and that is a problem.    **Any solution is welcome, both to avoid deleting pages and to complete the "endDate": "startDate": fields with the Field Reference.**

summary: Add support for single-option select fields to Directory Manager
description: Currently when setting up a Directory Manager to be used by React Pages, you can only specify a String field to use as reference to generate the various directory entities.  It would be great if this functionality could be extended to support single\-option select fields as well for generating the various DM entities.    The current setup works really well for Location based DMs, where you can specify city and state for example.  For other uses however, this is a bit limiting, for example when you want to build a DM based on "store types", "topic", etc.  In those cases you want to be able to use dropdown field to make sure all entities have consistent values for this kind of information.
workaround: As a workaround, you can now write the single\-option select field to a separate text field (a [++platform function++](https://hitchhikers.yext.com/guides/functions\-get\-started\-guide/) can be used for this), and pass that value to the Directory Manager configuration instead.

summary: Create repo within "Add New Site" workflow
description: When creating a new site associated with a github account, there's no option to create a new repo, only to use a repo that's already created. Would be helpful to have an option to create a new repo for a new site directly within the platform UI.
workaround: create the repo directly in github

summary: Filter, Sort, and Grouping Options for Page Deploys
description: For sites with a large number of live pages, it can be difficult to find and view a particular page or group of pages. To make it easier to find a particular page(s), it might be helpful to include a few organizational methods such as:    * Linking the "Pages Live" indication on an entity's profile directly to the deploy details/URL for that page (currently links to the Pages Overview screen which does not directly connect to the live URL details)    * Adding filter and sort options to be able to filter by associate entity, subdirectory elements, etc.    * Provide labels and/or folder structure for organizing groups of pages \- currently this can be done with the Directory Manager but when there's not a direct parent\<\>child relationship, there's no method for organizing URLs    * Present an image of the associated page similar to the view present in other CMSs
workaround: Scroll through pages of deployed URLs

summary: Access Language Profiles on Linked Entities
description: Hi Team,    My client is interested in exploring multi\-language pages, but they have several sections on their existing pages that are powered by linked entities e.g., FAQs. It doesn't currently seem possible to access language profile data for linked entities, so configuring these FAQs as part of a multi\-language setup would entail creating a separate field that links out to the FAQs *and* separate multi\-language FAQ entities. Also I'm not entirely sure this would even work because the Spanish page would have to simultaneously pull content from both the Primary and Alternate language profiles. This precludes us from taking advantage of the features that language profiles provide, so being able to access the language profile of linked entities would be useful.    Thanks,    Jon
workaround: (Maybe) Create a separate field that links out to the FAQs *and* separate multi\-language FAQ entities

summary: Highlight Active Pages Fields in the Knowledge Graph
description: Would love the ability to see in the Knowledge Graph which fields are actively syncing/mapped to Pages    Many accounts tend to have extra custom fields, so it'd be helpful for employees and customers to know if they are actively functioning
workaround: 1. Fill in the field and wait to see if the content processes live on the page    2. Reach out to the CSM/Yext Support to troubleshoot    3. More Technical \- Review the streams within an account's GitHub and look for any references of that field

summary: In LexicalRichText Component, add the ability to Add a Custom Wrapper Class to the rendered content
description: Currently we get the default class of "Editor\-input" for content rendered by the LexicalRichText, we would like the ability to add an additional or custom class to the rendered content so we can better target with a reusable CSS class.
workaround: The current workaround would be to add a wrapper div around anywhere that component is rendered with the class

summary: Directory Manager to have configuration for naming conventions for Entities and Slugs, as well as fields for ordering
description: The current Directory Manager when used to create directories for locations, will create and assign entities based on address field in the base entity (location).    When creating directories for Japanese addresses, the Japanese name is converted to Chinese Pinyin, which messes up the ordering and the slugs.    We want the following options:    1. Convert Japanese to how its read based on the Japanese dictionary for search    2. Capability to use custom dictionaries for converting certain characters or phrases    3. Capability to set ordering options using a custom/preset definition    4. Capability to run connector within directory manager    Reasoning:    1. We need the slugs created to have readable names    2. We need to order the directories not based on Chinese Pinyin    3. We need to order the directories based on position (usually from north to south for regions and then alphabetical for cities)    4. If the above is not available, we should have an option to run a connector within the DM run, since some of it can be done by connectors    5. Having connectors to rename prefectures (47) should be doable, but changing city names and sublocality names will not be feasible as there are ones with the same characters but with different pronunciation (ie 大和 can be read as Yamato, Daiwa, Taiwa, Oowa, Owa)
workaround: Have connectors manually run after DM runs to convert entity ID/Slugs into readable names with ordering numbers.

summary: Pages - Site Attributes History
description: Hi Team,    There is currently no logging for site attributes, which means there is no way to check site attribute history i.e., creations, updates, deletions. We recently had an issue where a few elements (and the site attributes that powered them) seemingly disappeared from one of a client's domains. The client had another domain that had the missing site attributes so I was able to copy and fix relatively easily, but I'm not sure what actually happened and it would be helpful if there was a way to get insight on this, either through the UI or querying in Snowflake.    I understand that we're pivoting away from site attributes to an entity\-based model, but there are a lot of clients on Classic Pages that could benefit from having this information available.    Thanks!
workaround: None

summary: Add Dashboard in the Platform that pulls in Core Web Vitals or Google Search Console data
description: Hey team!    Would it be possible to pull in Page Speed Insights, Core Web Vitals and Good URLs data into the platform as a dashboard to track trends over time? It would be super helpful from a checks and balances standpoint to be able to pull this data into the platform for clients to see, and be able to track trends over time.
workaround: Go directly to Google Search Console, but requires credentials

summary: Add Ability to Split XML Sitemaps by Page Type
description: One of my clients asked if we could split out XML Sitemaps by Page Type. The main reason they were asking is that they were informed this is much better for SEO purposes and improves pages ranking on search engines such as Google. This is not something we're able to support currently, but the client requested this be added to our Product Team's roadmap.
workaround: We're just using one main Sitemap for all their pages.

summary: Change Pages branch settings UI screen
description: When looking at the branch settings page in the Pages UI screen, I find it difficult to differentiate between the different branches. I find it strange that the spacing between the branch Access Control settings and Branch Environment variables is larger than the space between the different branches.    I would suggest that we make the branch settings screen similar to the deploys screen where there is a dropdown that allows you to toggle to different individual screens for each branch like you do for deploys.
workaround: NA

summary: Allow Wildcards in Pages Redirects
description: We're adding redirects to the Hitchhikers site and it would be great if we could use wildcards in our redirect URLs (e.g. "/tracks/answers/\*" all redirect to X).
workaround: We currently have to add each URL to redirect individually.

summary: Making Storm More Dev Friendly - Adding Github Repo Link
description: On the Pages \- Sites page on the platform, it would be helpful to have another column beside the "Domain" one that links the Github repo the site lives in \- if I'm new to working with a client it's hard to have to go into every singe site to see what repo it is attached to.    This would be a nice to have for devs, especially for clients that have pages spanning across multiple repos.
workaround: NA

summary: Enhance the Knowledge Tags that are generated by our system to include encoding
description: The copy \& pasted script tag did not work because it was not properly encorded. Their account ID included "\&" in it and it did not convert into "%26" and it simply stayed as "\&" which ended up not getting recorded via the activity tab and the schema validator.    Could you please include encording for these script tags?
workaround: Adjusted the script manually in this case.

summary: Improved Role concept for Pages
description: Similar to access to single entities (when creating a User), it would be helpful to give them access rights (Code Editor, Repository, Point\-in\-Time Backups,) to just single Sites. Especially in global accounts, that would enable subsidiaries to be more independent and especially with Pages faster to roll out backups
workaround: You can either grant access for a role to all Pages or to non – because there is no Folder\-like scope structure but the structure is around "Sites"

summary: HashmiHR.com online jobs
description: Recruitment Services
workaround: Visa Services

summary: Page Builder not showing entities assigned to page template
description: Currently, on Page Builder it is not possible to clearly see which entities are associated to which page template.    For exampled, if I have 2 page templates that uses the same entity type, I can only see number of live pages (which would correspond to the number of entities associated to that page template) but I cannot see which entities these are.    If you go to edit mode, you can select the entities, but the dropdown will pull every entities of the entity type of the page template, even if there is no live page associated to a specific entity.    From "View History", there is Location Details but not possible to expand or export the full list of entities using the page template.    It would be great if it was possible to expand and also have an export option.    Thanks!
workaround: From "View History", you can see "Location Details" but the list only shows 4 entities and then "+ number of entities" but it is not possible to expand that list.    Only below, in logs, you get the Yext ID of the entities. However this is not very intuitive nor a friendly layout.

summary: Assigned multiple category page licenses to an entity
description: Currently we cannot assign multiple category page licenses to one entity. For example, an insurance agent may have several different insurance category pages depending on which types of insurance they can sell (home, auto, etc). It would be helpful to be able to assign multiple category licenses to an entity
workaround: NA

summary: Bulk Knowledge Tag Implementation
description: Hey team,    We'd love to empower clients with more materials on how they can implement Knowledge Tags at scale.    While we can manually pull all scripts for each location in Yext, or generate them in bulk using Excel and changing the entity ID per URL, we'd ideally like to empower clients with how they can then take those tags and implement them in bulk, using platforms like Google Tag Manager or WordPress, AFTER the tags are pulled from Yext.
workaround: Manually embed each specific location tag within the header of each location page

summary: Beiträge editierbar
description: Beiträge editierbar
workaround: NA

summary: status
description: Link to [https://www.yexttrust.com/](https://www.yexttrust.com/) on the Yext support site. It could be on [https://help.yext.com/](https://help.yext.com/) main page or the Submit a Ticket page ( [https://help.yext.com/hc/en\-us/requests/new](https://help.yext.com/hc/en\-us/requests/new) )
workaround: Submit a support ticket, and have support respond with the URL [https://www.yexttrust.com/](https://www.yexttrust.com/) .    or bookmark [https://www.yexttrust.com/](https://www.yexttrust.com/) if you already know it.

summary: Voiceover function for people who use screen reader
description: I know Yext already provides great voiceover function that when a user keyboard navigates to the search bar, Yext read out two messages: "X autocomplete options found." and "You are currently on a text field. To enter text in this field, type." I think this great, especially "X autocomplete options found." is good because customers can know how many hardcode are listed.    I think it's already great but if it's possible, it would be ideal to announce how many results are populated when a user enters text in the input field too. Not only the number of hardcode, but also the number of results for text user entered.
workaround: NA

summary: Expiration Logic for Events on Landing Pages
description: When an event has a timeframe included, the event automatically gets taken down from the landing page as soon as the event's end time has passed even though the date itself has not passed.    We can consider leaving the event up for the remainder of the day even if the event time has passed so people who attended the event can view and share it with others after the event has passed.
workaround: NA

summary: Close authorization complete tab automatically
description: When doing local development for an extended period I have to authenticate several times in the browser (significantly more if doing something across multiple accounts). After completing authorization you are directed to this page [https://www.yext.com/configauth/complete](https://www.yext.com/configauth/complete). Shortly after this vite continues and opens your dev host, and I never close the authorization page.    I would prefer if the tab just closed if authorization was successful.    *\<script type="text/javascript"\> window.close() ; \</script\>*
workaround: NA

summary: Bulk upload option for registering Pages events analytics
description: Can we create an option to bulk upload \& bulk edit mapping for Pages events? Events can range anywhere from 3\-10 pages worth of analytics and having to manually set the mapping, upload a description/title, etc can be very time\-consuming.    Thank you!
workaround: Manual mapping, one by one

summary: Add Alt Text Field to Page Builder Template Modules
description: It would be helpful to be able to add a custom alt text in the Page Builder Template when using constant values for images or logos.
workaround: Images / logos must be mapped to an entity to support alt text.

summary: Knowledge Tag Improvement for Embedding Holiday Hours
description: The main idea would be to improve the way embedded fields display via Knowledge Tags.    In this specific case, we're looking to allow for the Holiday Hours to display in a more structured and easy\-to\-read format.    Current embedded code:    \<span data\-yext\-field="holidayHoursFormatted"\>\</span\>    Displays as:    'Saturday, September 3, 2022 Closed, Sunday, September 4, 2022 Closed, Monday, September 5, 2022 Closed'    Preferably we'd want holiday hours to display in an easier read format when installed on a page, especially when there are successive days.
workaround: Current work around is to just have the info combined into one line.

summary: By appointment only
description: Is there any way we can have stores that are not open, nor closed, but only open by appointment showing so in the pages opening hours?    Right now opening hours is either open or closed (which makes sense). I've added the additional text, but it will then state that the store is closed.
workaround: No current workaround

summary: NEW Categories for Yext
description: Yext has an expansive list of Categories, but it does not include a Category to correctly define my engineering consulting business. Therefore, please add the following Category to correctly define my business type:    Professional Services \> Engineering Consultant    This Category could also be expanded to include the following additional Categories:    Professional Services \> Engineering Consultant \> Electromagnetics    Professional Services \> Engineering Consultant \> Antenna Engineering Consultant    Professional Services \> Engineering Consultant \> Microwave Engineering Consultant    Professional Services \> Engineering Consultant \> Microwave Heating Engineering Consultant    Professional Services \> Engineering Consultant \> Millimeter\-Wave Engineering Consultant    Professional Services \> Engineering Consultant \> RF Engineering Consultant    Professional Services \> Engineering Consultant \> RF Heating Engineering Consultant    Kindly let me know when this change can be made to Categories so my business is correctly defined in Yext.    Thanks,    Dr. Scott Best
workaround: PRIMARY    Business Services \> Design Agency    ADDITIONAL CATEGORIES    * Contractors \> Building \& Design \> Engineer

summary: Highlight Mandatory Fields for Pages
description: I've seen many instances where users have created a new entity, populated certain fields, and expected to see it live, but that is not the case as certain mandatory fields were not populated. Many users do not know which fields are required, so I think it'd be useful if we could somehow highlight those that are essential/mandatory (even an \* next to the field name would be great). Also, useful for us, for example, when we are covering for someone else, and these requirements are not properly recorded.
workaround: Look through previous exchanges, clipboard, compare it with other entities, which is all very time\-consuming.

summary: A/B Testing Through Sites
description: With the roll out of sites, perhaps consider creating an A/B testing option that would allow users to select different versions of their sites to display based on traffic.
workaround: Currently the Services team leverages Google Optimize to do this. Not a bad workaround at all, but just something to consider as we continue to flesh out the platform.

summary: Code Editor: Code Review View
description: It would be cool if the in\-platform code editor has a Code Review view/Pull Request flow similar to Github or Gerrit. Ideally it would allow a reviewer to leave comments and/or approve the change before it gets merged in or deployed.    This would allow developers/HH's who are working in the in\-platform code editor to get another set of eyes on their Pages/Answers changes without having to go through another service like github.
workaround: Create branch in the in\-platform code editor, manually go to github (if they have access) and create a PR there, after PR merge/deploy.

summary: Add a Warning Against Deploying a Branch to Production
description: Hi Team \- [This](https://hitchhikers.yext.com/modules/ans260\-integration\-options\-getting\-live/05\-publishing\-to\-prod/) Hitchhiker's unit states that "you will always reference a specific commit tag and never a branch (like "build" or "master")." However, an user is able to publish a branch to Production and it is a common mistake novice administrators make without understanding the implications. It would be beneficial to add a warning screen that notifies an user that they are performing an action that is against best practice and link them to the HH module that shows the correct way to publish a commit tag to production.
workaround: n/a

summary: Page Builder - Add sorting support for three-column list module
description: Can we add configurable sorting to the Three Column List module in Page Builder, driven off of user\-selected fields within the Page Builder template? Currently, there is no way to do this, which makes sorting location lists for uses like a directory page difficult when you have to sort by both State, and then a secondary sort by City to ensure locations are listed alphabetically.
workaround: Hardcoded custom HTML module

summary: Pages Content Updates
description: Revamping a page in the Pages tab to be more of an interactive site editor ("point and click"). It could have what looks similar to an individual's page in staging, and allows for interactive updating of content by clicking on sections to edit, where it is fed underneath by KG. Similar to Page builder today but use is for a more of a per entity approach. Ultimately this would help reduce the need of custom dashboards because its a more user friendly / interactive approach to managing content.    I think this would help field users understand where content updates to their pages exist, as KG becomes more complex it is harder for individual users / field level people to understand where updates in KG reflect on pages.
workaround: Tooltips on KG / custom dashboard / static images of where updated content will show up

summary: Pages - Sites - Config UI
description: Thanks for your consideration.    Today, on the Pages \> Sites page in Storm, I'm able to view important config information about the site. See attached image. It would be a big benefit to be able to also see whether or not there are mutli\-language pages defined for the site. This would be done by simply displaying the locales JSON object from the config file.    "locales": \[  "en",  "de",  "es",  "fr",  "fr_BE",  "it",  "nl"  \],
workaround: Check the github repo

summary: Pages Site Code Editor - Auto Scroll for Console Log
description: Currently, the Console Log within the Code Editor for a Pages Site does not automatically scroll when there is a new entry in the log (a new line). I think it would be a minor but helpful UI improvement if the log window could automatically scroll so that the most recent row is always at the bottom of the window. This would prevent the need for the user to repeatedly scroll to the bottom of the window to see the newest lines.
workaround: Currently, as new live previews are being restarted, the user needs to manually scroll to the bottom to see the most recent entries in the log.

summary: Clickable Images on Pages
description: Currently there is no way to link images on our pages. We would love it if clickable images was a functionality added to Page Builder. This would create more versatility in usage of the "Three Column List" module within Page Builder. We believe this functionality would drive more traffic to new products we're promoting and likely increase conversions.
workaround: Page Builder can link text on pages.

summary: Support adding robots.txt for page builder page.
description: Customer wants to set "Disallow: /" for page builder page prior to official launch.
workaround: Can we add robots.txt via Code Editor?

summary: Ability to show ribbon banner with only 1 field populated
description: I would like to have my promotional ribbon display on my location page when either the Headline field ( c_bannerHeading ) or Text field ( c_ribbonText ) is populated.    The Text field has the ability to display bold text, so the Headline field isn't necessary at all.    There may be times when we only want regular paragraph text, and not headline bold text.
workaround: None. Both Headline and Text fields must be populated to display the promotional ribbon.

summary: Filtering Pages Analytics by Language
description: At the moment, it appears you can't filter Pages analytics (e.g. Page Views) by the language of the Page. It would be helpful to be able to filter by language to track analytics for pages that have multiple language profiles. For example, if a page has both a Spanish and English version, we would want to see Pages data for just the Spanish page or just the English page.
workaround: The current workaround is exporting a report with Page views dimensioned by Page URL and filtering to pages including "/es/" in the URL to get data specific to just Spanish pages.

summary: Update Phone Number format on Posts
description: When using the post function in Yext to post on multiple GMB pages, the phone number function is hard coded to display the phone number in this format: +16312061200    It would be great if it instead formatted with parentheses so that it was easier to read.
workaround: Individually posting to each entity GMB page and typing in the phone number so that it formats correctly.

summary: Knowledge Tag Script Export
description: Hi team,    I wanted to confirm if there is currently a way to export all of the Knowledge Tags that have been added to a page within the platform? My client wants an export of a master list of all script tags per entity and also the amenities/offers tags so that they can update this on their end if possible. If this is not currently supported, this could potentially be an idea for future enhancements.
workaround: So far I have not found a workaround.

summary: Pages Button for Live & Staging Pages
description: Adding a button / CTA that links to an entity's Live and Staging Page in Entity View.    When viewing an entity, add buttons that link to both the live and staging version of that entity's page, if it exists. This is similar to how we have a 'Live Listings' button where you can view the Listings that the entity is live on and eventually click to view that listing. There is a 'Pages Live' button that leads to a dashboard on the page, but does not easily present the actual link of the page / staging page / multi\-lang page. We suggest adding a button that leads users directly to the live page \- this functionality is also already present when viewing a Page Builder template, but is not present in Entity View and there is similar view for Custom Pages.
workaround: Currently, users have to navigate to 'Pages URL' or 'Landing Page URL' field in order to find the Page URL. Sometimes, it is not evident that a page is live or not until looking through the whole entity to see if this field is populated. Staging sites are usually only accessed by receiving a link from a Yext team member.

summary: Pages Analytics Metric - # of Live Pages over Time
description: Nationwide is looking to track the number of live pages in their account month over month. This metric would be useful for highlighting license utilization as well as ROI.
workaround: None \- I have suggested using [saved filters](https://www.yext.com/s/1996565/entities2?b=1996565#p0=subscription&p1=includes&p2=2721&p3=&selectedSavedFilterId=144744) in order to see the current number of entities on Pages, but this doesn't show a comparison to past dates.

summary: Page Builder Autofill / Search Bias
description: Hi Team,    I would like to request some enhancements to the default Page Builder locator. Namely:    * The ability to add a regional / country bias to the autofill, thus being able to limit the autofill results to just one country.    * The ability to add a regional / country bias to the search itself, thus preventing the scenario of certain terms / geographical places shared between regions returning incorrect results. For example, "Naples" is a place in the US \& Italy, we want to add the ability to tell the locator to bias towards Italy.
workaround: There is no current workaround other than using custom\-built Pages.

summary: Clickable Images on Pages
description: Currently there is no way to link images on our pages. We would love it if clickable images was a functionality added to Page Builder. This would create more versatility in usage of the "Three Column List" module within Page Builder. We believe this functionality would drive more traffic to new products we're promoting and likely increase conversions.
workaround: Page Builder currently only has the functionality to link the text on Pages.

summary: Automatically Publish Pages for New Entities in Page Builder
description: **Challenge:** Publishing Pages for accounts using Page Builder requires a user to manually select the entities in Knowledge Graph and then add a feature pack and select the template to publish ([instructions](https://help.yext.com/hc/en\-us/articles/360017455952\-Publish\-your\-Pages)).    **Ideal Solution:** Use Advanced Filters to automatically determine which entities should have a Page published for a given Page Builder Template. This would bring feature parity to the Custom Pages product.
workaround: [Instructions here.](https://help.yext.com/hc/en\-us/articles/360017455952\-Publish\-your\-Pages)

summary: Scheduled Updates for Site Attributes
description: Site Attributes can contain important information on Pages, especially for Header/Footer. Currently, the only way to publish these changes is through a manual trigger. It would be great if we can schedule updates to the content of site attributes just like we can schedule updates on entities in KG.
workaround: None

summary: Yext Reviews Widget - Support for multiple languages
description: A Yext Customer currently utilizes our Yext Reviews widget. They would like to be able to deploy the widget on a "Spanish" site. Currently, the widget's labels E.g. Total Number of Reviews are hardcoded in English. The idea would be to add support to the widget for multiple languages (e.g. Spanish) The site's developer could deploy the widget to a site and specify a language/locale through a widget configuration parameter.
workaround: none

summary: [Improvement] Read/Update the Google or publisher specific category through API
description: It is possible to override the general categories applied to a particular entity, with a specific one for certain publishers (like Google).    This is something that is often leveraged with the Google Business profiles of our customers.    Since it is the category used that leads to some features like the Google attributes, do you think it could be possible to read/update this category through API?
workaround: Currently, we obtain an error as the outcome of specific automatic updates.    This is due to our system trying to apply some Google Attributes that are not supported by the Google\-specific category which overrides the generic ones.    The only possible solution currently is to read and edit the Google\-specific category directly on the Yext web site after the error is detected

summary: Export Google Account IDs and Location Group Names for Linked Accounts in Knowledge Graph
description: Could we add functionality to the platform that allows users to fetch the Google Account ID and Location Group Name for a given Linked Account directly in Account Settings or Publisher Configuration? It can be difficult to view the Google Account ID directly in the GBP UI and often a lot of back and forth is required to find the populate the correct Google Account ID on the entity level.    Allowing users to view this information in the Knowledge Graph or export it from the Knowledge Graph (based on the accounts they have already linked) would give users greater visibility into their GBP accounts and minimize the number of clicks it takes to setup a Google listing.
workaround: Currently users have to navigate to their location group in GBP and find the Google Account ID in the URL.

summary: GBP / Multi Reservation URLs
description: Current state:   Google Business Profile (GBP) can have multiple Reservation URLs but Yext can have only one in Knowledge Graph.   Currently, If client set 2 reservation URLs at Google Business Profile and set 1 at Yext, Google Business Profile can have only 1 after synced.   Ideal state:   We'd love Yext to have set\-up options for multi reservation URLs for GBP.
workaround: No workaround in Yext.

summary: Listings Notification for Google if Location moves into Perm/ Temp. Closed Status
description: While they are rare occurrences, we've seen instances where a Google listing (and Apple Maps) will randomly go into a Permanently Closed or Temporarily Closed status, even if Yext nor the client made that update in Yext. A Listings Notification (even through **the Verifier**) would be huge as clients/ Yext could get notified ASAP if this happens.
workaround: No workaround from a notification standpoint. Clients usually find out that a certain Google listing was incorrectly marked as Temporarily or Permanently Closed if an employee or customer find this out when searching.

summary: Add Bing Places and Apple to the Verifier feature
description: With the new Verifier feature we receive a great feature to track the accuracy of the data within the listing network. Our greatest pain points in fact are Bing Places and Apple, as both publishers are submission partners. Therefore we need to go trough all listings to see if Bing and Apple published the correct data.
workaround: NA

summary: Bulk uploading social posts
description: The ability to update and schedule out social posts in bulk via a file upload
workaround: NA

summary: Listings Accuracy Column in All Listings table
description: I LOVE the new Verifier feature! It would be really helpful if there were a column on the All Listings table (https://www.yext.com/s/\[b.id\]/listings/all) that displayed the Listings Accuracy % for that listing. You'd then be able to sort and navigate through that table, review the Verifier results, and take action on them all in the same place.
workaround: Currently, it's difficult to navigate from the new Listings Accuracy Report I built to the Listing Detail page for a specific entity to review and fix the errors. I had to build the report, export the report (since I have a lot of entities), copy the store ID, paste it into the filter on the All Listings table, and then click into the entity. Repeat that process for every listing I want to review.

summary: Facebook Page Post Clicks + Impressions
description: Listing posts used to report impression and click metrics for Facebook posts sent through Yext, which were useful for consolidated reporting. Can we bring these back?
workaround: We can log into Facebook and check posts manually but this is extremely time consuming and does not work for companies that have 600+ locations like us.

summary: Scheduling Opt in for Coming Soon Locations
description: A lot of clients launch locations as 'Coming Soon' months in advance of the actual open date. The issue here is that the only major publishers that accept this feature are Google and Facebook. Yext then has to remember to opt into the rest of the publisher network a week before the actual open date (which could be months after the initial launch). If you could schedule a location to opt in on a certain date, this would alleviate a lot of extra planning that causes confusion between internal team teams, the Yext account team and the client. It would also eliminate missed opt in dates for the wider publisher network.
