workaround: * Putting the ticket on hold until the rest of the publisher network needs to be opted into    * Adding calendar reminders to opt into the rest of the publisher network    * If client allows it, mark it as temporarily closed and opt into all publishers and then schedule an update to mark the location as open on the actual open date.

summary: Social posting only allows 1 photo image to be uploaded. Can this be improved to allow end users to add multiple photo images per post and video files? Similar to how other online presence platforms may work today. Enterprise customers are regularly re...
description: Posting template to allow users to add more than one photo/image file per post. Also allow video files to be attached to posts.
workaround: TBC

summary: Facebook New Page Experience: synchronization not possible
description: Enable synchronization between Yext and Facebook for New Page type pages.
workaround: If you have a Facebook page of type New Page, you cannot add it as a store linked to your main Business page. As a result, you also cannot sync Yext with Facebook for that page.

summary: social posting
description: Our Enterprise clients require the ability to:    (1) add multiple photos to social posts (Facebook supports multiple photos)    (2) add video file e.g. mp4 to social posts (Facebook supports videos)    Their previous api partners supported multiple photos/video in social posts to FB.
workaround: Social posts direct from FB \- which they need to do per page (negating the convenience of bulk posts from Yext)

summary: Sync Settings in New UI
description: Hey team! It would be great if we could re\-add the "Sync Settings" page in the platform in order to easily view all publisher specific settings in one place. Alternatively, it would be great to add "Google \> Configuration," "Facebook \> Configuration," etc. to the quick find (CTRL + K) in order to quickly identify publisher specific settings.
workaround: Manually click through "Publishers \> Google \> Configuration" and then "Publishers \> Facebook \> Configuration" etc. to understand all publisher specific settings within an account. Previously, this was all visible in one view/screen under "Sync Settings," so it has added time to click through multiple screens/views to extract the same information in the new UI without a quick find shortcut.

summary: Add Video files to social posts
description: Client requested the ability to add video/mp4 files to social posts.
workaround: N/A

summary: Include all Publisher in Publishers Tab, not just listing publishers
description: With the latest update you can now only see listings publishers in the publishers tab. However, review only publishers like MeinungsMeister do not appear there. You can filter by publisher and select MeinungsMeister, but there is no result then. You can also view a "publisher detail page" but there is no information there
workaround: none.

summary: Google Chat
description: Google's feature, Google Chat, lets business owners chat directly with customers. Can Yext integrate this feature within its interface so partners can chat directly with customers within Yext's platform?
workaround: Creating a new category within Response tab

summary: Social Posting data within Analytics
description: Can we include data from Google Local Posts within our Analytics section? Customers can currently see impressions/clicks within the Post tab, but would be good if we could bring it over to Analytics, and to offer a breakdown by location if possible.
workaround: We can see impressions and click data for each post, but would be great to see it in ANalytics

summary: Link with GMB
description: When linking sites with GMB, is it possible to also display the business code of the GMB profiles when matching? This can simplify the process significantly.
workaround: None

summary: Google REPEATED_ENUM type support
description: As for Google Business Profile attributes, Yext doesn't support REPEATED_ENUM type for certain fields. It'll be great if we support them.
workaround: Directly manage in GBP console.

summary: ECL widget localisation
description: Our widget does not show pricing in Japanese properly. In Japan, we don't have cent equivalent, and thus, 100 yen should be '100yen' not '100.00yen'. Due to this, all Japanese partners end up giving up utilising menu, product, and service widgets.  This is also observed on publishers who display our widget pages. As such, it'll be great we respect the locale and adjust display accodingly.
workaround: n/a

summary: Facebook Child Page Post Likes
description: Hi,    We would really like to be able to report on Post Likes that we posted to the child pages on Facebook. It is an important measure for our clients.
workaround: None

summary: Allow GMB match selection in Listings UI
description: Enterprise users currently do not have the ability to choose which listings in their GMB accounts the entity should be matched to. It would be great to have a similar flow that exists for Facebook, particularly for users who want to self serve. The Facebook version can be seen in the release notes [here](https://help.yext.com/hc/en\-us/articles/360044580092\-Release\-Notes#initialmatch). This will greatly increase the transparency and control over the GMB listings launch process for end users.
workaround: Current workaround is namely to submit a support ticket so that someone in Yext can pull matches for the user, provide potential match candidates that the user can say y/n to, and have someone update the match in the backend. For completely self serving clients, the matches are often chosen by someone on the backend without any input from the business owner. There may be times where, if the match is very unclear, someone from Yext may reach out to the business to confirm if the match looks appropriate. There is an account setting to disable new listings creation for GMB which helps the platform not accidentally create new listings as duplicates, but this does not safeguard against matching to the wrong listing and overriding the content.

summary: Improve matching criteria for "Potential Duplicate" matches for Duplicate Suppression
description: Please help reduce the number of potential matches that show up for Duplicate Suppression. In many cases, a large enterprise customer can have hundreds of "duplicates" that are actually 0/3 match for NAP.
workaround: The only way to remove these from a partner reseller account is to invest the time to manually review hundreds of "not duplicate" matches to get to the few true duplicates that should be suppressed.

summary: GMB Attribute translations within the platform
description: I understand there's currently a limitation of 15 language translations that are supported in Yext for Google Attributes. As a result, customers in Estonia that use the platform see these attributes in English, whereas the rest of the dashboard is translated in Estonian. Can you please build out support for more translations \- at least to the same languages that the dashboard is available in.
workaround: None

summary: Listings Sync Settings in Quick Find
description: Hey Team,    Would it be possible to add something like \[Publisher\] Sync Settings or \[Publisher\] Details to the quick find function?
workaround: Clicking into Listings, then to publishers

summary: GMB Review Webhooks
description: It would be really helpful to alert or show in the platform when GMB Webhooks are not installed, causing a delay in Reviews being pulled in.
workaround: Reviews get pulled in weekly, but there is no workaround to get them in real\-time if you are unaware of the connection issue.

summary: Multi-photo and video posting to locations FB page
description: Would love to have the ability to post multiple photos and video when posting to Facebook from Yext.
workaround: Currently when our locations have this content we have to post it manually since we are unable to do so through yext.

summary: Ability to send and publish videos to GBP
description: ``` GBP allows to upload videos, but currently this upload is not possible from Yext (platform and API). ```  [https://support.google.com/business/answer/6103862?hl=es](https://support.google.com/business/answer/6103862?hl=es)    ``` Assess the development so that Yext (platform and API) allows videos to be uploaded to the profile. Thank you. ```
workaround: NA

summary: Escalations Reported From Listings Area in Yext - Add issue to ticket
description: As a user, when we place a listing escalation from inside of the Yext platform, a ticket is created, but the issue is not included in the ticket\-\-at least not in a place where it's visible to the user. For instance, I received a Support Update email, and I know you fixed something with the specified entity (that I reported via Listings), but since there is no record of what the issue was in this ticket, I don't know what it is without doing some investigative forensics on my end.
workaround: Current workarounds:  Guess what the issue might be?  Clarify it with the person who is working on it (uses another cycle of email back\-and\-forth)  Go look at the entity and see if I can determine what issue was reported.

summary: Adding Event Listings in Bulk
description: My client with Event Listings flagged that they have the same event running across multiple different locations. It would be great to duplicate event listings and change the address in a bulk format so that they don't need to be individually added to the platform.
workaround: NA

summary: Adding Lieferando or Just eat as a publisher
description: "Lieferando", the German version of "Just eats", would be a helpful addition to the publisher network, especially for the "gastronomy" sector.    Above all, evaluations and analysis data can be gained in this way.
workaround: NA

summary: Add au-magasin.fr as a Publisher: Associer la plateforme Yext au listing au-magasin.fr
description:
The new online directory: au-magasin.fr is very well referenced in the Google engine. Could we associate the Yext platform with the au-magasin.fr listing?



Le nouvel annuaire en ligne : au-magasin.fr est très bien référencé dans le moteur Google. Pourrait-on associer la plateforme Yext au listing au-magasin.fr
workaround: NA

summary: Notification or Report for change in Listings status
description: Many of our resellers would like to be able to track when a Google or Facebook listing changes from Live to Unavailable so they can quickly take action. Currently, the platform doesn't support insight into changes like this.
workaround: At the moment, resellers can download a report from the Partner Portal with the listing statuses for Google and Facebook. This is great, but must be pulled manually, and requires manual comparison with previous reports to identify changes for specific accounts.    We also have the listings API, and some resellers do have a daily run to check on statuses and compare with the statuses they stored on their end to detect changes.  A platform report that could be automated would be a big help to many resellers, especially for ones that don't have resources to setup an API check.

summary: Link Yext platform with Bing Places account
description: Hello,    it would be wonderful if Bing Places accounts could be linked to the Yext platform, like Google. With this direct link, the expansion of Bing Analytics would be possible. I have several customers who are very interested in this.    Greetings    Sina
workaround: none

summary: Filter option by folders and labels in the publisher overview
description: Hello Yext,    is it possible to include a filter by folders and labels in the overview of publishers (with the information: number of entities \| number of synchronizations ...)?    ![0](data:image/png;base64,)    That would be very helpful. Especially for customers with several brands.    Greetings    Sina
workaround: none

summary: Knowledge Assistant Nudge Scheduling & Customization
description: Hello! My client mentioned it would be really helpful if they could schedule KA Nudges for specific days / times (ie., scheduling this for right before holidays to remind their franchisees to update holiday hours in Yext). It would also be helpful if they could customize the Nudge prompt.
workaround: Right now the only workaround is to log into Yext and send a one\-time Nudge immediately, which would be quite time consuming for their corporate team, or to schedule a monthly Nudge; however, the monthly Nudge would just be a reminder to update their Business Hours so they're worried franchisees will ignore it / not understand that they should be updating their holiday hours, **not** the Business Hours (this has been an issue in the past). There is no current option to schedule a Nudge for Holiday Hours, just Business Hours.

summary: Adding new publishers for our entities to sync to that Google deems as "trusted publishers" and references in the "about this result" page.
description: The article link below reviews the "About this result" feature in Google SERP, and how you can utilize this feature for SEO.    [https://searchengineland.com/google\-about\-this\-result\-seo\-insights\-436435](https://searchengineland.com/google\-about\-this\-result\-seo\-insights\-436435)    After doing some research, I discovered that several publishers are listed under the "About this result" feature, but these publishers are not included in the group that Yext collaborates and syncs to. According to the article (linked above), these publishers are trusted sources for Google, and thus important to make sure information is accurate and up\-to\-date.    Here are two examples of the "about this result":    [https://www.google.com/search?q=About+https://www.njvet.com/\&tbm=ilp\&sa=X\&ved=2ahUKEwj2pLyCmu2DAxUWBGIAHYaADhYQv5AHegQIABAE](https://www.google.com/search?q=About+https://www.njvet.com/&tbm=ilp&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj2pLyCmu2DAxUWBGIAHYaADhYQv5AHegQIABAE)    [https://www.google.com/search?q=About+https://www.vetpracticepartners.com/\&tbm=ilp\&sa=X\&ved=2ahUKEwiYiIeIm\-2DAxV3GmIAHec0AlUQv5AHegQIABAE](https://www.google.com/search?q=About+https://www.vetpracticepartners.com/&tbm=ilp&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiYiIeIm\-2DAxV3GmIAHec0AlUQv5AHegQIABAE)    Here are Publisher examples we are not syncing to in Yext:    [https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/veterinary\-practice\-partners](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/veterinary\-practice\-partners)    [https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/56458\-72#overview](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/56458\-72#overview)    [https://reviews.birdeye.com/tenafly\-veterinary\-center\-149244417632333](https://reviews.birdeye.com/tenafly\-veterinary\-center\-149244417632333)    [https://www.pawlicy.com/vets\-near\-me/nj/tenafly/tenafly\-veterinary\-center\-18337/](https://www.pawlicy.com/vets\-near\-me/nj/tenafly/tenafly\-veterinary\-center\-18337/)    [https://www.zoominfo.com/c/tenafly\-veterinary\-center/41030642](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/tenafly\-veterinary\-center/41030642)    So, my question after all of this is, could Yext take a look at these and consider adding these publishers to the group we sync to? I did notice some of our business information was not correct on these publishers sites, which is a major bummer.
workaround: The workaround would be having to log into these publishers individually to update information. But we have over 145 entities and counting, so that is not realistic, unfortunately.

summary: Lead Generation Listings - ZoomInfo, Apollo.io, Salesforce - Match listing data (NAP) to these lead generation listings.
description: Currently, it is almost impossible to correct inaccurate information on these sales listings. They state they are api generated and cannot be manually overridden. This phone number was pulled from an entity which is not ours.    Would love to match our Yext entity listings to these lead generation listings but at minimum NAP and website.
workaround: We were reached out with an inaccurate phone number which belongs to another business. We have been working with this business to source these and have been contacting each lead generation. Apollo.io I was able to create a free user account and update the information. ZoomInfo will not respond. We are still sourcing and cannot find the main source.

Currently it looks like you need to delete the future opening date even though it has passed for the Listing to launch due to it not being a feature supported by Apple.    Thanks,    Olivia

summary: Remove "Create Yelp Listing" flag for Yelp Enterprise (only exists in old UI)
description: There is a legacy feature that's auto\-enabled on new accounts with Yelp Enterprise that prevents Yext from creating a Yelp listing. The feature can only be accessed via the old UI via this link: [*https://www.yext.com/s/{BUSINESS_ID}/account/listingsSyncSettings*](https://www.yext.com/s/%7BBUSINESS_ID%7D/account/listingsSyncSettings)    ![image.png](https://files.slack.com/files\-tmb/TT8ARFBFY\-F06CQ081Y8L\-98be288094/image_480.png)    Instead of defaulting to creating new Yelp listings for Yelp MEC clients, an error is thrown with the UR: Matching Issue: *You must confirm if your listing exists before we can sync your data.*    This unavailable reason is tied to feature in the screenshot, which is not accessible in the new UI and frankly is unnecessary since although Yext can create a Yelp listing for an MEC client, the client must still work with their Yelp CSM directly in order for that listing to be granted the *advertiser/MEC* status.    Ideally, we can remove that "Create Yelp Listing" checkbox entirely or at least default it to be checked for new accounts.
workaround: Client needs to contact Yelp first to create the new listing, then re\-match it in Yext vs having Yext automatically create the listing.

summary: Pest Control Service
description: Ever wondered how to keep your space pest\-free? Pestronix Services is your go\-to solution for comprehensive [Pest Control services](https://pestronix.com). With a commitment to excellence, our expert team employs advanced techniques to ensure a pest\-free environment for homes and businesses. We understand the impact of pests on your well\-being, and our services are tailored to provide effective, safe, and reliable solutions. From thorough inspections to targeted treatments, Pestronix takes pride in delivering results that exceed expectations. Trust us to create a space that is not only pest\-free but also conducive to a healthier and happier living or working environment. Choose Pestronix Services for a proactive approach to pest management and enjoy peace of mind.

summary: User restrictions for listings escalation feature
description: With the new release of the listings escalation via the listings tab we are opening up the support offering to all users with access to that part of the platform to escalate listings rather than account managers and d2d contact.    It would be great to create a toggle or something on user creation/update where either the client/ Yext/someone has to make the conscious choice to allow this for each user. This would help avoid an influx of listing tickets to support from users that might not have the necessary publisher access rights and give the clients better control over their account management. Ticket resolution times and client sentiment could be improved by only having the appropriate contacts being able to escalate listing issues.

workaround: NA

summary: Configuration of Apple Photo Gallery within Yext
description: Clients are able to configure core fields in Yext for GBP \& Facebook, and they are also able to specify for the Photo Gallery specifically if they want to override old photos.    Are we able to add the ability to be able to override old business photos in Yext for Apple Business Connect.
workaround: None

summary: Upload Logo on Apple Business Connect
description: It should be possible to upload Logos for ABC listings via Yext
workaround: Currently, the logo upload is possible via ABC only. The user has to log into their ABC account and upload the logo for the single locations.

summary: Support of Logo upload for Apple Business Connect via Yext
description: Currently, it is not possible to upload the Logo for ABC Listings
workaround: The workaround is to add the Logo via ABC.

summary: Allow Duplicates with old / former / acquired brand Names to be Suppressed
description: Duplicate Suppression currently identifies duplicates with 1 or 0 matched NAP fields, however they are "Unable to Suppress".    For businesses that have acquired multiple different brands over the years, they will have a number of old / false listings across the Listings Network and Duplicate Suppression will identify them as Possible Duplicates (since the addresses are still the same for example).    However, they are "unable" to suppress, leaving the old brand names' Listings searchable / findable.
workaround: Reaching out to the publisher directly is the only known workaround, however can be difficult for a large number of "Unable to Suppress" listings across a large number of publishers.

summary: Hours
description: Ability to list hours for certain days and text, i.e. "By Appointment Only," for other days in the main hours field.
workaround: You must list the hours as Closed for the day and have "Requires Appointment" checked.

summary: Permanently Closed Listings Update should be separate from taking down the web page
description: The "Internal Use Only" field "Closed" "Yes/No/Unspecified" currently removes the recently permanently closed location's web page in addition to broadcasting to Listings that the location is closed.    These 2 functions should be divided. The "Closed" location needs to be live for 4 weeks after the closure to account for listings that are slow to update. Currently, a visitor to a Listings page that is slow to update could incorrectly see that the location is 'open' on and not be able to verify on the our company webpage that the location is actually closed.    **I propose 2 fields:**    1. "Location Permanently Closed" to tell Listings and make the location page display "PERMANENTLY CLOSED"    2. "Remove Location URL" to turn the URL into a redirect to its parent page.
workaround: Update the Entity name, description text fields, and meta data to begin with "CLOSED \- "    This workaround was mentioned in a ticket from 2022    [https://hitchhikers.yext.com/ideas/5189859004384909838](https://hitchhikers.yext.com/ideas/5189859004384909838)

summary: Listings Publishers
description: On the Yext's Publisher Network page, it would be super helpful to have a download feature to pull the most recent publisher list to share with clients and sales reps. So basically, you could add whatever filters you need, and then be able to download an Excel (or other) spreadsheet to easily share the information.
workaround: If a client or publisher asks for a list of publishers, we currently use this website and have to type out all of the results into an excel doc to share. It's very tedious. Then, when new publishers are added to the network, the doc has to be recreated to reflect the changes.

summary: Unavailable reasons/error messages linking out to the field that needs to be updated
description: Sometimes I will receive an unavailable listings message that says my "sublocality" needs to be updated. As a user, I do not always know what field this might be, and it would be helpful if the error message linked me to the exact field I needed to update.
workaround: Reach out to Yext Support, or click around and guess what that field might be referring to.

summary: Pet-friendly filter enhancements
description: it appears that our network (Accor) is increasingly featuring hotels with rooms that accommodate pets. Could we consider incorporating a distinction, such as labeling them as 'Pet\-Friendly' rooms? It's worth noting that certain hotels offer only a limited number of these rooms, so the term 'Pets Welcome' might come across as vague and potentially open to misinterpretation. Also noted that different publishers may not take the field but might be worth adding a caveat field where hotels can add more info for this particular field i.e. limited pet friendly rooms, booked only via phone etc..
workaround: NA

summary: Avoid English translations in the questions and answers section
description: ``` In the questions and answers section of a client, they all appear translated into English ("Translated by Google") What is the reason this translation appears? Could you put the untranslated option to see it only in Spanish? Thank you and regards. ```
workaround: NA

summary: Create Saved Filters in All Listings
description: Within Yext Content, we are able to create Saved Filters based on certain criteria (ex. Closed: No, Subscriptions: Listings) in order to see which entities meet that criteria at any given time.    We cannot do this in Listings \> All Listings as we have to manually add each filter/ criteria every single time, one by one. Being able to create Saved Filters can alleviate a lot of manual effort to solve for Not Synced listings.
workaround: Manually add filters/ criteria one by one.

summary: Validation for user-uploaded photos
description: > Yext Listings occasionally flags GBP listings with a warning that there's an issue with the dimensions/size of a photo in the Photo Gallery field of the Knowledge Graph. However, in many cases the real issue lies with one of the photos being a "multiframe photo."   > > This specific error is not related to the photo's dimensions or photo size. It is only visible in the API response upon Listing sync. This can be confusing and frustrating for Yext users who have already confirmed that their photos meet [Google's criteria](https://support.google.com/business/answer/6103862?sjid=1398742116871868394\-NA#photo\-guidelines), but receive a generic message in Status Details that one of their photos could not be synced due to incorrect formatting.   > > It would be much simpler if the Yext Content had validation for multiframe photos so that the users would not be able to upload them in the platform. If the photo cannot be validated in upon upload, it would be incredibly helpful if Yext Content had a tooltip in the photo gallery warning that a photo was multiframe *or* if the Status Details on the Google Listing identified which photo(s) could not be synced.   > > This would allow users to identify and resolve issues related to multiframe photos directly in the platform without needing to contact Yext support.
workaround: > Currently, users also have no way to determine quickly in the Yext UI *which* photo in their photo gallery is a multiframe photo.   > > Users contact Yext Support to determine which photo is causing an error. After the photo is identified, the user then needs to delete the photo, change the format, and re\-upload it to the platform. However, for accounts whose photo gallery sync settings are set to "add to existing," this process can result in Google photos being duplicated on a Listing.

They have expressed that they would love it if the tool would scan and identify ALL potential duplicates (even those owned by other GBP accounts) for them to view. This would be more of an identification tool and not a suppressing tool.    Best,    Wilhelmina

summary: Bulk Upload Listings & Reviews Matches
description: I'd love if users could bulk upload Listings and Reviews matches in the platform via spreadsheet upload (all publishers) or Connectors (Google specifically). This would allow users to own the matching for their Listings and Reviews at scale without needing to contact Yext support.    For Google Connectors, we already identify the External Listing ID field and are able to map it to Custom or Profile fields at the entity level. If users had the option to make this External Listing ID the Reviews and Listings match (either by field mapping or Connector setting), this would reduce the number of clicks it takes to launch entities in Yext.

summary: new publisher suggestion: german government is planing a new online hospital platform
description: German Federal Health Minister Karl Lauterbach wants to create an Internet platform where insured citizens can find information about the quality of hospitals in their region. This is a chance for Yext to work with the German government in order to insure high quality hospital data is available on the new platform.    More information can be found here: [https://www.stern.de/news/lauterbach\-plant\-internet\-plattform\-zu\-angeboten\-und\-qualitaet\-von\-kliniken\-33551972.html](https://www.stern.de/news/lauterbach\-plant\-internet\-plattform\-zu\-angeboten\-und\-qualitaet\-von\-kliniken\-33551972.html)

summary: Workaround for unsupported symbols on Apple

Would it be possible to create a custom field in Content for these entities and match the name we send to Apple to this custom field? Do you have any other ideas for a workaround? How do other clients deal with this limitation?    Response on the sme\-apple Slack channel: "We currently do not have a workaround for this as this is a blocker on Apple's end and will cause the API to fail"

The platform had an option to compress after upload, like unto the built\-in cropping functionality.    Auto\-compression seems reasonable since these images aren't intended to be viewed on large screens or printed, just on phones, tablets, or computers.

summary: Post Template
description: We are envisioning a Post Template system where we're able to save any post/set of posts created; specifically saving the combined setup of the publisher selected, media, post copy, event information and call\-to\-action type/URL.    This would allow for a quicker, easier process for when the post is being re\-uploaded to new entities in the future.    We are also envisioning the functionality to separate posts into different Folders for the sake of organization for different brands, events, timelines, etc.
workaround: The only current workaround to quickly setting up previously used Posts is saving the images/videos under Assets, and utilizing certain URL fields within the Knowledge Graph for Posts (i.e. Google Post URL 1, etc). Otherwise, we see no option for saving the full post setup.

summary: Ability to set "Replace Existing" at a location-level instead of an account/global level for publisher settings

Many clients manage a portfolio of brands that may have a different set of needs.    * Idea 1: Apply the setting at a location level    * Idea 2: Apply the setting at a folder or label level

summary: Listings Verifier: Use Google Website Override info when filled out
description: Hi team,    It seems that currently, the Verifier takes the URL field as attribute although the Google Website Override URL is filled out. This leads to confusions and errors in the Verifier since the Verifier states that the URL is not synced while it is just because the config is using the Google Website Override field.  It would be great to either add the Google Website Override field in the Verifier criteria when it is filled out or make sure that the URL criteria in the Verifier takes into the Google Website Override info when filled out.    Thank you!
workaround: None \- only explain to the customer that Google Website override field is correctly pushed despite what the Verifier states.

summary: Duplicate Suppression Show Listings URLs/IDs
description: When looking at the Duplicate Suppression screen, it would be helpful to include more metadata in order to compare what the active listing is vs the potential duplicate, especially for complete NAP matches. For example:    * Show the Listings URLs of each listing    * Show the External IDs of each listing
workaround: N/A

summary: Bulk upload of Google Business Profile posts from excel/csv
description: Hello,    With the recent availability of ChatGPT to connect with Google sheets via API, this is a major time saving opportunity to create GBP posts in bulk for clients.    A functionality to upload bulk GBP posts via an excel/csv would be incredible. Instead of manually doing hundreds of GBP posts per month, we can use ChatGPT with a custom Google Sheet to write them for us, and download it into a csv/excel file of the correct format + upload this to Yext.    Time savings on GBP posting would be astronomical.    Best,    Charles
workaround: NA

summary: Schedule Listings Launch for Apple Maps
description: Currently, Apple Maps does not support the "coming soon/ open date" functionality that Google does. This creates many issues for clients who have to manually opt in to Apple on the open date. If they forget to do this and launch a new location, Apple will create a listing that goes into a temporarily or permanently closed state. If we can have a scheduled launch (date/ time) for Apple maps in the platform, that would be ideal.
workaround: No workaround. Manual effort to have to opt into Apple on the open date to avoid the issue.

summary: Escalate Listings Errors
description: Today, when a client with Premier Support escalates listings, the next thing that happens is inconsistent. Sometimes it goes to support and sometimes it goes to Publisher Operations who then asks for the ticket to be closed (example here \- [https://tags.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/1707982](https://tags.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/1707982)). Ideally the ticket who be created in the requester's name (currently it is "pr yext"), with the CSM cc'd and would be assigned to Premier Support.    The idea behind being able to escalate tickets is good, however in practice it is inconsistent in how helpful it is.
workaround: CSM has to ask a manager to change three fields manually:    * Requester Change to the client email    * Manually cc the CSM    * Manually reassign to Premier Support

summary: Select products and services entities by label / Knowledge Graph / Produkte und Services Entitäten nach Label selektieren
description:
When displaying products on GMB, we want to be able to select entities by label.



Bei der Auspielung von Produkten auf GMB, möchten wir die Entitäten nach Label selektieren können.
workaround: NA

summary: Update Listings Tab Action Buttons
description: When clients need to take additional actions on listings, it is hard to know what action to take, especially to opt out, Confirm Sync, Manage Google Admins, etc. That is because these are all hidden under the dropdown arrow next to the primary View Listings button.    It would be great if we could improve the UX here to show the available options in the dropdown as stand\-alone buttons and/or use things like toggles to opt\-in and out of listings.
workaround: NA

summary: Best Practices on Linking Facebook Accounts
description: It would be helpful to create a new article outlining best practices for linking Facebook accounts. Currently, a lot of resellers link personal Facebook accounts that manages multiple client pages, which is not intended use. We've seen higher cases of linked account issues / issues with posting to Facebook (failed posts, duplicate photos) when personal Facebook accounts are linked.
workaround: There are 2 recommended setups:    1. Optimization Tasks \- This process can be initiated within our UI by following the steps in [++this help article++](https://help.yext.com/hc/en\-us/articles/115005989566\-How\-to\-use\-Content\-Capture\-). Alternatively, there is an [++API++](https://hitchhikers.yext.com/docs/managementapis/accountsettings/optimizationtasks) which can be used to generate links that LinkNow can send to their customers to link their accounts.    2. System User \- The Facebook Business Manager tool does have a way for LinkNow to manage pages on behalf of their customers without use of a personal account. They can do this by setting up a [++System User++](https://www.facebook.com/business/help/327596604689624?id=2190812977867143), and linking that to Yext.

summary: Synchronization of product lists to Google Business Profile - not Google policy compliant
description: Hello,    if lists are created in the Knowledge Graph under the Products and Services section as a product list and as a service list, then both types of lists are submitted to the Google Business Profiles and stored in the Google Business Profiles as services.    **However, it does not comply with Google guidelines to deposit products under services.**    **Therefore, the synchronization of product lists must be prevented.**    For publishers (except Google) this is not a problem if both types of lists are transmitted.    Translated with www.DeepL.com/Translator (free version)
workaround: Disable synchronization of lists under Products and Services for Google.    Manually create the services in the Google Business profiles.    Definitely not feasible for large customers and unfortunately also customer\-unfriendly.

summary: Service list: Synchronize sections with Google
description: Hello,    currently sections in the created service lists are not transmitted to Google Business Profiles. However, if you manually create the services in the Google Business Profiles, then you can also store individual sections, which will also be published.    ![0](data:image/png;base64,)    Therefore, it would be extremely helpful if the function that exists in Google Business Profiles would also be synchronized via Yext.    Greetings Sina
workaround: Disable synchro of service list to GMB and enter into GMB manually. For large customers, the effort is too great in the manual creation in GMB.

summary: Add Caring.com and A Place for Mom to the publisher network
description: Add [Caring.com](https://www.caring.com/) and [A Place for Mom](https://www.aplaceformom.com/brand?&kw=3234\-Google_US_Brand_Tier_1&kwg=a%20place%20for%20mom&keyword=a%20place%20for%20mom&match=e&device=c&network=g&account=G:US:B:APFM_Master&campaignid=11496331373&adgroupid=113135335580&ad_id=609119150132&AdPosition=&geo=9067609&distrib=s&targetID=kwd\-18558071&interest=&utm_source=google&utm_medium=paid_media_sem&utm_campaign=Google_US_Brand_Tier_1&utm_content=null&utm_term=a%20place%20for%20mom&isInquiry=true&attribution_id=174&&&gclid=Cj0KCQjwu\-KiBhCsARIsAPztUF3ZT5HQllONm7N1XQDjY971DY\-pPvHFqhY\-jDUjXAgppkSvu5RX7k4aAhUOEALw_wcB&gclsrc=aw.ds) to our publishers.
workaround: NA

summary: Remove Publisher Error for GBP Category Sync
description: There is a new feature in Yext that requires a manual override to sync up categories if the categories in GBP are different from what's in their knowledge graph. With this rolling out, it will cause a lot of problems for Partners who manage listings for many clients. Having to manually override the categories for a large number of entities is not at all feasible. For me, the information we have about our clients in Yext is the source of truth, so having to manually override a field so that it can get published is an unnecessary step.
workaround: NA

summary: Allow Publisher Suppression based on Entity Type or other attributes
description: Some users, especially in healthcare may not want Professionals launched on specific publishers but want their facilities launched.    Provide a way in publisher configuration, especially for publishers like Google, Facebook, Bing, and Apple to avoid opt\-ins for specific entity attributes like Entity Type, Folder Location, or Labels.
workaround: NA

summary: New primary category : Neue primäre Kategorie
description:
I think it would be good if you could also add the car brand “Dacia” to the primary categories. Renault already exists, but Dacia itself doesn’t yet exist.



Ich fände es gut, wenn man unter den primären Kategorien auch die Automarke „Dacia" anlegen kann. Renault gibt es zwar schon, aber Dacia selber noch nicht.
workaround: NA

summary: Hero Numbers in Locations Summary Dashboard
description: Would it be possible to get the hero numbers for the Google Listings Actions and Listings Impressions reports added into the new Locations Summary dashboard? The old 'Location Summary (Legacy)' dashboard had the hero numbers and I've had a couple of customers request this on the new dashboard. It's great for showing the value, particularly for reports that are emailed out every month via notification to multiple stakeholders, as the export shared is static. In export the numbers are needed, as you're not able to hover over the week to see the number of actions unless actually you're in the platform.
workaround: Log into the platform and hover over the graph to see the numbers. Note this doesn't work for users who don't have access to Yext and instead have reports emailed.

summary: Listings - Facebook - Option to Not Push Hours
description: Can we add functionality for Facebook where we don't push hours/core information? Or add a content policy where we can specify the field to pull? The context is that we have a client that is using Yext mostly for the FB social posting feature. However, the FB pages they post to are owned by a larger general/convenience store and the client only posts on the FB pages specifically for their brand. So, the hours that are stored in the KG are not the same as the larger store's hours. Tl;dr \- they want to sync to the FB pages in order to post but not to update the hours data.
workaround: Create duplicate entities to opt in only for Facebook

summary: Pull in Google Business Profile pre-defined Services to Yext
description: Currently, we have been utalising the Yext Products \& Services feature of the Knowledge Graph, in order to publish custom **Services** directly to GBPs \- by setting up Enhanced Content Lists.    However, industry case studies published recently, such as [this one from Whitespark](https://whitespark.ca/blog/how\-to\-easily\-boost\-local\-rankings\-with\-googles\-predefined\-services/), and [this one from Sterling Sky](https://www.sterlingsky.ca/services\-in\-google\-business\-profile\-impact\-ranking/), appear to confirm that adding the services Google **pre\-defines** via the GBP Manager can positively impact profile visibility and ranking.    Currently, the Yext API does not pull in these Services that Google Pre\-defines, Yext can only publish Services added via Enhanced Content list creation via the Products \& Services section.
workaround: Though adding pre\-defined Services manually, directly via the GBP Manager one location at a time is possible, at scale across all our locations is not currently feasible as a quick win.    If this could be possible via API to Yext in the future, it would be of huge efficiency and performance benefit!

summary: Add Das Telefonbuch as a Publisher
description:
Hello Yext team, we would like to add the following publisher: https://www.dastelefonbuch.de/(https://www.dastelefonbuch.de/) There is currently no link to Yext. Would that be possible? Many greetings, Benjamin Evers



Hallo Yext-Team,    wir würden gerne folgenden Publisher hinzufügen:    [https://www.dastelefonbuch.de/|https://www.dastelefonbuch.de/]([https://www.dastelefonbuch.de/|https://www.dastelefonbuch.de/])    Aktuell gibt es keine Verknüpfung zu Yext. Ginge das?    Viele Grüße    Benjamin Evers    SV SparkassenVersicherung
workaround: NA

summary: Google Reserve
description: We have \>1,000 locations that are driven by appointments (not unlike a restaurant or hair salon). Google introduced Google Reserve which provides an integrated and simple online booking process. We'd like to leverage that at scale, and Yext seems like a logical place to do that given it is already integrated with all of our APIs. We already have an online scheduling API created for our data... can we do this?
workaround: NA

summary: Add "Take Google Data" Option to Listings Launch Flow
description: I would love if there was a step in the Listings Launch flow (for individual entities and at scale) that allowed you to change data in Yext without needing to go back to the individual entity. This would be similar to the data file upload flow in Yext. When you upload a file and the file has errors \- rather than make you restart, Yext allows you to edit the field directly in the UI.    This would be helpful in cases where a user wants to sync an entity to Google, but wants to avoid the risk of triggering re\-verification that comes with manual data QA or just prefers the data in Google over the data in Yext. Some examples would be when a user identifies a match, but the Address in GBP is hidden and the Address in Yext is visible, or when there's a discrepancy in primary Google category. Allowing either a quick data change or a "Take Google Data" option (that takes publisher content policies into consideration) would help the Listings Launch process to become even more self\-serve.    Any changes made to entities in the Listings Launch process by selecting "Take Google Data" could be stored in the Knowledge Graph, similar to Data File Uploads tag under Configuration.
workaround: * Manually checking data in Google and QA\-ing to ensure that data in Yext is a 1:1 match for core fields    * Creating a connector to sync Google data to Yext     * Notes:     * Connectors require the Listing in Google to have a Store ID that matches Entity ID in Yext     * A new Connector need to be configured for every individual Location Group, which can be a significant lift for accounts managing a large number of brands     * Connectors are not easily scaled across sub\-portals    * Exporting data from Google and uploading it into Yext (also typically requires a Store ID match or manual matching, which can be a significant lift depending on the number of entities)

summary: Manual Listings Manager Section
description: Add a place to manually enter your non\-Yext publishers to the dashboard so you can see all of your listings in one place. Currently, if you have listings that are not included with Yext, you have to list and track them elsewhere (maybe in a spreadsheet?). It would be nice to be able to add listings manually, including the platform name and the link to your profile so you get a more holistic view of where your company is displayed online. This is with the understanding that Yext couldn't push to these publishers or interact in anyway. It's just an idea to help us managers see all of our listings in one place, even those that aren't supported by Yext (yet?).
workaround: Start tracking all of your Yext supported listings and your other listings in a separate XLS to get a more complete list of your online profiles.

summary: Sync "Insurance Accepted" field to Google
description: Can we set up an integration to have the "Insurance Accepted" sync to Google? In its current state, this field syncs to 4 publishers, but not to Google. Google offers the ability to surface this information on healthcare facility and provider listings, but Yext is currently not able to sync this information.    Yext currently offers a free\-hand input for this field, while Google offers a drop\-down. Can we work with Google to get these pre\-selected options to ensure that the data syncs correctly?
workaround: Currently, the only workaround is manually adding this information into Google Business Profile. Google seems to also scrape the internet to add this data to listings, but there is no way of confirming the accuracy of this data, or updating it through Yext.

summary: GBP Messaging - Bulk Location Toggle On/Off
description: Currently, there is no option to toggle Google Business Profile messaging on or off via the Yext knowledge graph.    For high\-volume locations (we have close to 4k) it's not feasible to manually check and switch messaging off (or on in the future) for each individual location directly in live Google profiles.    If Yext were to ever enable this at scale, it would be a huge time and effort saver \- and allow far more control over GBP (and potentially other publishers) user experience. To be able to assert that messaging should be switched on or off at the point of GBP launch, and thereafter should our need/strategy change would be a game\-changer!
workaround: Manual process directly via live GBP only \- not feasible for 4k+ locations that need to be checked and actioned one by one. Manual guide [++here++](https://support.google.com/business/answer/3403100?hl=en). A potential, future Yext messaging partnership with Google could bring this about!

summary: Possibility to add labels to entities from the Listings UI
description: Being able to label entities directly from a Selection on the Listings / Publisher UI.    For ex. for Unavailable listings (for missing hours or missing Logo for ex.)    There is no practical way to directly act on those entities (edit data)    Adding an "Edit Data" from the Listings UI could also be very practical !
workaround: current workaround is to export the listings XLS, take keep the entity IDs, add a labels column with a label value and reupload in Bulk.  We'd need to do this process several times when QA'ing Listings implementation for several reasons

summary: Enabling custom fields to sync to Apple fields
description: It would be great if we can customize the URL we send to Apple like we can for Google and other publishers. I see a lot of clients want to use an Apple specific UTM tracking tag on their URL, so it would be great if we could add Apple to our custom content policies.
workaround: NA

summary: Managed Duplicate Suppression Dashboard
description: Hi Hitchhiker Team,    Right now clients receive three excel files on a quarterly basis showing the listings that have been suppressed as well as the claimed and unclaimed Facebook pages they can review. Is it possible to begin displaying these locations in the platform instead with an email notification when new updates are posted?    Ideally the screen would provide a high\-level walkthrough on the value of MDS, as well as what the Yext team has already done, and what is required for the client to do (mainly Facebook). If it is possible under the "listings suppressed" section to show the details on the suppressed location (name, address, phone) that would be great, but not entirely necessary. Thanks!
workaround: Fairly time\-consuming process of gathering files then formatting them for clients before sending. Some clients are confused about the next steps they have to take so the projects occasionally stall out. We want to keep the momentum from all of the work that has been done and make it easy for clients to take the next step and also be able to show value.

summary: Hotel OTAs (Online Travel Agencies) in publisher network
description: Currently, there are no supported OTAs in the Yext publisher network for hotel support. Those could include sites such as booking.com, expedia.com, and so forth. TripAdvisor has been one of the newest publishers that is not quite an OTA, but is similar in many ways. Because many of these OTAs also support reviews and knowledge graph data, we'd like to see more overall support for them, to continue to keep absolute consistency of data across the web. At the same time, this would also open the door for more review response.
workaround: NA

summary: Customized URLs with UTMs per each listing
description: We noticed that with all listings that we get with Yext, we can only put one URL rather than URLs with UTMs for each channel. It would be cool to have an option to either:    1. Include URL fields for each listing    2. Yext provides URLs with UTMs per listing in a formula we provide or they provide    This will allow our insights team to properly track leads that come in.
workaround: NA

summary: Google Q&A Activity Log
description: Google Q\&A are not currently being tracked in the activity log of an entity. You cannot see when they are received or when they are responded to.    We became aware of this when an entity manager claims to have left responses several weeks ago. She saw the responses saved in Yext, but they never published to Google. After two weeks, she came back to check if they had synced and her responses were no longer in Yext and had never published to Google.    Without a change log, I was unable to verify if it was user error or syncing error.
workaround: NA

summary: Home Services Premium Listings
description: A premium set of listings for the Home Services space, similar to what we have for Restaurants and Healthcare. Some of the listings that clients have been asking for:    Porch.com    HomeAdvisor    Angi    Thumbtack    Houzz    Potentially adding the capability of syncing the publisher data with Yext with a workaround would be amazing.
workaround: NA

summary: Allow for an User to Define Custom Fields or Linked Entities to Sync to "Services" in Listings
description: It would be great if users are able to define Custom Fields and/or Linked Entities that identify the Services offered at their locations for syncing out to Listings.
workaround: The current workaround is to use ECLs which are not user friendly to create nor update at scale.

summary: Option to hide open graph image when posting a URL
description: When we're posting a URL via Yext to FB, the open graph image is always used as a link preview on the FB post. Oftentimes even though the image is on the page, it may not be relevant to the post itself. Would like a way to indicate to NOT use the Open Graph image when posting via Yext.
workaround: Posting on FB directly where we have the option to remove the OG preview image.

summary: Google Linked Account Warning Message
description: On the Linked Accounts tab, the flow of adding a linked account and assigning it to entities does not explicitly state that changing the linked account could cause listings sync issues ([image](https://ibb.co/tHJW253)). While this may be implied, it would be helpful for a more explicit warning in the pop\-up modal, similar to the warning that appears when reorganizing folders ([image](https://ibb.co/RgLXsvz)).
workaround: NA

summary: Not Synced Error Message
description: Not Synced Error Message
workaround: NA

summary: Syncing Photos to Apple
description: Hi Team!    Our client reached out about wanting to have photos synced to Apple from Yext. That being said, we noticed that in the pub fields doc it says we do not submit photos to apple. Our client shared that it is his understanding that photos are pulled into Apple through Yelp (is that also our understanding?). Would it be our recommendation that the most direct way to influence photos on Apple would be through Yelp? If that is the case the product request here would be to expand our partnership with Apple to include submitting photos.    Thank you for your consideration!    Wilhelmina
workaround: Potentially syncing photos to Yelp and indirectly to Apple?

summary: Single Publisher & Status Page
description: It would be great if there was a single page showing all publishers in the network regardless of publisher type and their status and the steps required to complete set\-up or resolve any issues with that publisher.
workaround: Having to switch between multiple pages to see a single list

summary: Expanding Publisher Site Reporting
description: We would like the reporting option to track all clicks on publisher sites \- review clicks, message clicks, photo clicks, product clicks, etc. This information will help us better understand what is most important to our customers when searching our brands.
workaround: Yext currently offers reporting on CTA clicks for Website, Directions and Call. At the moment, we are unable to track any additional information.

summary: Notification by for when locations become unsynced by Publisher
description: Notification by for when locations become unsynced by Publisher
workaround: NA

summary: Products in the Google business profile: Produkte im Google Unternehmensprofil
description:
Hi development team, we would like to upload 3 products to the Google company profile for all of our entities. In principle, this is also possible with Yext, but unfortunately we still have a problem: We need an individual tracking link for each location, which would have to be inserted directly after the target URL. The background is that our local insurance agency would be logged into the website. Without agency log-in: https://www.sparkassenversicherung.de/content/privatkunden/produkte/auto/e\-bike\-versicherung/ With agency log-in: https://www.sparkassenversicherung.de/content/ private customers/products/car/e\-bike\-insurance/?kanalType=agn\&kanalName= 5496019 Many greetings Benjamin Evers



Hi Entwicklungs-Team,    wir würden gerne für alle unsere Entitäten jeweils 3 Produkte ins Google Unternehmensprofil hochlanden. Grundsätzlich geht das auch mit Yext, aber leider haben wir noch ein Problem:    Wir brauchen für jeden Standort einen individuellen Tracking-Link, der direkt hinter der Ziel-URL eingefügt werden müsste.    Hintergrund ist, dass so unsere Versicherungsagentur vor Ort auf der Website eingeloggt wäre.    Ohne Agentur Log-In:    [https://www.sparkassenversicherung.de/content/privatkunden/produkte/auto/e\-bike\-versicherung/|https://www.sparkassenversicherung.de/content/privatkunden/produkte/auto/e-bike-versicherung/]    Mit Agentur Log-In:    [https://www.sparkassenversicherung.de/content/privatkunden/produkte/auto/e\-bike\-versicherung/?kanalType=agn\&kanalName=|https://www.sparkassenversicherung.de/content/privatkunden/produkte/auto/e-bike-versicherung/?kanalType=agn&kanalName=] 5496019    Viele Grüße    Benjamin Evers
workaround: NA

summary: Ability to set Service area OFF in GBP configuration settings
description: Add ' Service area ' for Google Business Profile configuration settings (Field Syncing \& Mappings).    Yext and Google Business Profile service areas don't match and have often problems with synchronization.    You can add much more needed service areas via Google Business Profile dashboard for GBP listing, whereas Yext's Knowledge Graph service areas have very strict limitations.    When location's address is hidden, it's obligatory to add service areas in Yext Knowledge Graph \-\-\> this overrides all service areas that are added in GBP dashboard for that listing.    Especially when a client wants to sync Yext with their GBP profile that has lots of service areas, we of course want to keep those, because Google service areas have great impact on client's GBP's search results and discoverability.    It would be very usable if service areas could be synced OFF in GBP configuration settings that would prevent any service area settings overriding GBP information and you could still keep syncronizing address from Yext to Google Business Profile.
workaround: You must set 'Address' synchronization OFF in GBP configuration settings and then ask Yext support to sync GBP profile with GBP ID number

summary: Partner Listing Scan - Similar Addresses/Business Names
description: When trying to scan businesses with very similar names and addresses to other businesses that are already active in Yext, the scan tool will not differentiate between them and will display a message saying that this business already has powerlistings although it does not.
workaround: NA

summary: Yext API method to get the current data from Google Business Profile
description: When we update a business profile via the Yext API, we don't know if we are overwriting correct information in the Google listing. If the Yext API could have a method to return the Google listing data, we could review it before making an update.
workaround: NA

summary: Payment Option JCB on Listings
description: I have seen several times where a client had JCB as a payment option on a competitor, whereas we do not have that field as one of the payment options. It would be great if we could add that as one of the payment options as this has happened to me 4 times or so already.
workaround: N/A

summary: Remove FAQs section for Listings clients without Review Response
description: On the entity level in the Knowledge Graph, there is a section called "Frequently Asked Questions". If the client uses Yext for Review Response, this allows them to sync FAQs to Google Q\&A. However, if a client only uses Yext for Listings and does not have Review Response, this field does not push FAQs anywhere. For Listings\-only clients without Review Response, we should remove this field from the Knowledge Graph.
workaround: Informing clients on a one\-off basis that they should ignore this field

summary: Publisher Integration Status Board Notifications
description: An opt\-in based email notification system that sends alerts to all opted\-in users whenever an update is made to the Publisher Integration Status Board.
workaround: Manually checking the Publisher Integration Status Board for updates.

summary: Yelp Impressions Data for Mutual Enterprise Clients
description: Today, Yelp Mutual Enterprise Clients are only able to see Page Views and Page Clicks for their Listings on Yelp. Would it be possible for them to also be able to see search impressions on Yelp as well in Yext Analytics?
workaround: Work with Yelp Account Manager.

summary: Push blank values for listings fields (or specifically GBP fields)
description: Currently \- When fields are populated in GBP \- We cannot replace those field values with blank values from Yext.    This would be immensely useful for making bulk changes \- as sometimes businesses have services that are only temporary, and when the service runs its course \- the field needs to be removed (think of an appointment service, or delivery service, and having to clear those URL fields).    It would be great to have the ability to push a blank / null field value for GBP fields from Yext!
workaround: Currently \- the information has to be cleared out 1\-by\-1 and entirely manually. This is sometimes not feasible depending on the scope of the information!

summary: Save filters on listings
description: Please all allow users to save filters on 'Listings' and not only on 'Entities'
workaround: NA

summary: Ability to add videos to Google Business Profile
description: To enable uploading videos to the Google Business Profile gallery from the Yext Knowledge Graph.    Currently, if we upload a video to the gallery in the Knowledge Graph, the video won't appear in the Google profile gallery.
workaround: Logging in GBP and upload the video manually.

summary: Reconsider Duplicate Suppression Tab for Healthcare
description: Hi team,    For our healthcare clients the duplicate suppression tab is very confusing and misleading. Since providers practice at the same locations what ends up happening is that providers get marked as possible dups of other providers. I understand that we are not actually suppressing these "possible dupes" however to a client this tab is misleading and inaccurate due to the overwhelming amount of false dup suggestions. I think we need to reconsider how we approach this for healthcare.    Please let me know if you have any questions,    Wilhelmina
workaround: This current work around is to steer clients clear of this tab since it would be better if they did not see it at all.

summary: Sending information to Bing when more than 14 business hours are listed: 営業時間の記載が14個を超えた場合のBingへの情報送信
description:
Currently, you can only send up to 14 business hours to Bing, and if you list more than 14 business hours, you will not be able to send all store information including business hours. Could you please consider implementing a system that would resolve the situation where all information is not sent if business hours exceed 14 hours?



現在、Bingには上限14の営業時間情報しか送信できず、14を超える営業時間を記載すると、営業時間を含めた全ての店舗情報を送信することができなくなります。    営業時間が14を超えてしまった場合に、全ての情報が送信されない状態が解消されるような仕組みの実装を検討していただけませんでしょうか？
workaround: NA

summary: Give the option to select one specific publisher on the Publisher Status Board
description: It would be nice to offer the option for both internal and external users to be able to select one specific publisher when accessing the [Publisher Integration Status Board](https://help.yext.com/hc/en\-us/articles/360030447552\-Publisher\-Integration\-Status\-Board).    Currently we have one client facing multiple listings problem sync due to the technical issues facing by Facebook and he always has to go throughout all the page to check the status of the issues he is impacted by, which I believe can be improved in term of user experience. See the video [https://www.screencast.com/t/jz9DZDMo](https://www.screencast.com/t/jz9DZDMo)
workaround: Use of the hotkey Crtl + F and then search by Keywords (however this means that the user will have to know a specific keyword related to the description of the error, which is not always straightforward)

summary: Yext Partner Scan
description: Yext's Partner Scan doesn't currently find all relevant listings for service area businesses due to some publishers hiding the address of the business. As a result, the scans lack important information and the prospective client may be skeptical of the services Yext offers. Is there any way to implement a fix to the scan to help better accommodate service area businesses?
workaround: n/a

summary: Hide Status Details
description: We should have a way to acknowledge and hide specific data issues like Character Limit issues form the Fix Your Data section of the dashboard.    *"Data Issue:*    * *This publisher does not support descriptions longer than 300 characters. As a result, the description will be synced but truncated to the nearest punctuation mark."*
workaround: N/A

summary: Ability to list multiple addresses in a practitioners knowledge graph
description: Currently we can only list one address within a practitioners knowledge graph. Many practitioners work at multiple locations, so it would make sense to list their secondary addresses within their KG. Sites like WebMD, Vitals, CareDash, and others have the option to add additional locations on practitioners profiles, so it would be great if Yext could provide this data to them.
workaround: There is no work around in Yext. If you'd like this information filled out, you would have to reach out to the publisher directly.

summary: Request Postcards in Bulk
description: When launching Google listings in location groups that do not have Direct Verification or Bulk Verification, if a user wants to request a postcard to verify the listing this must be done manually for every location.    Could a Listings feature be added that would allow users to request postcards in bulk? It would be helpful to store data in Yext for each entity under Google Listings indicating:    1. Whether the entity is eligible for PCV    2. Whether a postcard has been requested    3. What date the postcard was requested
workaround: Currently workarounds (Direct verification or bulk verification) only apply to net new listings, not existing listings that require re\-verification.

summary: Category list
description: Please add an option to download the complete category list by publisher
workaround: This is currently available by requesting from the Account Manager

summary: GBP / Secondary Phone Number
description: Current state:    Regarding to [Google help site](https://support.google.com/business/answer/3039617?hl=en#zippy=%2Cphone), Google allows users to set 2 phone numbers. Yext, Yext allows only one phone number to be set up.    Ideal state:    We'd love Yext to have a set\-up option for secondary phone number for GBP, too.
workaround: No workaround for Yext currently.

summary: duplicate cleansing via table
description: you can export the duplicates as a table. In the table there is an action column.    ![image.png](https://ci6.googleusercontent.com/proxy/GOhSgcmJMZEZ3K3GLi9cYbmvq3w4dOAp7bPnI7tWs8M5UCLSdUUbhy4wtBrNEFRlEQn\-KdqmMniNQ4bSy6vI38yqks07utmih2vekaHHLdc5MQ5iTlwwh9nRWU9Gvks_c35X8A=s0\-d\-e1\-ft#https://help.yext.com/attachments/token/ZkpjeCg4aEmxK7axBhKhX8iTK/?name=image.png)    Currently, the column action is not stored with any function.    I have customers who would like to use this field to clean up duplicates via a table.    So in the column action via defined actions (suppress, no duplicate) the cleanup via table could take place.    Greetings    Sina
workaround: none

summary: Make Publisher Configuration Tabs Visible by default
description: There is no way to access the Listings \> Publisher \> Google/Facebook Configuration tabs in an account until *after* licenses are assigned. This section should be accessible by default so that we can review sync settings with clients on kickoff calls to streamline the implementation process.
workaround: Wait until licenses are assigned to then review publisher configuration settings

summary: Notifications for Google User Content
description: Ive had several clients ask me about notifications for GUC.
workaround: At this time you can get notifications directly from google, but not from Yext.

summary: Synchronise social media links and Google Business
description: A number of social media links can be stored in Google Business Profiles. Among others Facebook, Instagram, Youtube ...    Please check whether the synchro via Yext to Google Business is possible in the future.    Currently it does not work.    Greetings    Sina
workaround: none

summary: Export all entities and verifier status from one place
description: Currently, if we want to export the listing details from the verifier, we need to navigate to each entity and to each publisher. It would be great if all supported publishers and all entities' Verifier data could be exported from one place.    Thanks.
workaround: NA

summary: Sync Publisher Statuses to Listings Status Details in Knowledge Graph
description: The ability to view any ongoing publisher issues listed in the publisher integration status board directly in the listings UI. If these statuses could be synced to the listings UI as an unavailable status or as a new status such as "under investigation", it would help save a lot of time with manually checking the publisher status board for updates.
workaround: Manually checking the publisher integration status board for updates.

summary: Add a start date in the listings UI
description: The ability to view when each publisher was opted into in the listing UI. This will help clarify how long listings have been in processing which will help set timeline expectations for Publishers like Bing.
workaround: NA

summary: Distinguish between "Synced" and "Submitted" Statuses in Listings Overview and Export
description: Distinguish between "Synced" and "Submitted" Statuses in Listings Overview and Export
workaround: Looking at publishers one by one to see whether an entity with Services has a "Synced" or "Submitted" status next to it.

summary: Uavailable Listing Resolution - Soft UR VS Hard UR
description: Spoke with Prduct team, they said we dont have this feature so here it goes!    It is hard to tell which one is Soft Unavailable (just a warning, does not affect the listing status) and Hard Unavailbles (needs to be resolved to go live) when there are mixture of both.    It would be useful if there a tool that specifies Soft Unavailable VS Hard Unavailable in Listings UI.    Thanks!
workaround: N/A

summary: EAC housingcare.org publisher integration
description: Hey Team,    We are a Housing Care provider in the UK and would love to see if Yext can build a Listings connection with EAC:  [https://housingcare.org/](https://housingcare.org/)  Our team have to manually make changes on this website and complex updates are either done by phone or email \- as such it would be amazing if Yext can build out a submission or API based connection with them as we will be able to bring more care homes onto the Yext platform:    [https://housingcare.org/providers/updating\-housing\-data/](https://housingcare.org/providers/updating\-housing\-data/)
workaround: NA

summary: Schedule Post Deletion
description: For social posts that have timeframes associated with them (i.e. promotional item with a deadline), it would be nice to schedule the deletion of the post.
workaround: Set calendar reminder to delete it

summary: Add citylifestyle.com to the publisher network
description: Add citylifestyle.com to our publisher network as clients have found via SEO tools the domain has a lot of authority
workaround: NA

summary: Manually Match to GBP in Platform
description: With the updates to GBP's UI, it's now significantly easier for a user to find the Listing ID of a specific Google listing. Currently, this ID can only be used to create a manual match to Yext in the backend. It would be great if users could use the Google Listing ID to manually match to an existing Google listing directly in the platform.
workaround: Currently, users must leverage Yext Support in order to create a manual match. By making manual matching available in platform, Yext Support would no longer be necessary.

summary: Extension of the publisher for duplicate submission
description: Hello,    is it possible to extend the publisher network to submit duplicates?    For Germany there are only 12 publishers available for this purpose.    ![0](data:image/png;base64,)    Greetings Sina
workaround: none

summary: Can't create a custom user role with Posting access but no widgets
description: Hello, I need to create a custom user role with Posting access but no widgets
workaround: and that currently the system doesn't allow it.

summary: Verifier- Lodging GBP Attributes Additional Fields
description: I think a lot of our hospitality clients would benefit from seeing lodging attributes included in the Verifier for Google! I know the accuracy of these tend to be top of mind for clients, so it'd be great if we could provide them that level of transparency directly in the platform!
workaround: We can do a manual cross\-reference audit between Knowledge Graph data and GBP, but this workaround is pretty time intensive!

summary: Fix providers with unspecified hours showing as closed on verifier
description: Hi Team,   It appears that for providers who have hours "unspecified" (a common practice) are showing as "closed" in the verifier. This is misleading since the entities are not closed but choosing not to sync hours.   Thank you,   Wilhelmina
workaround: Just ignoring this error.

summary: Add Untappd to Listing Support
description: Untappd is an important publisher for restaurants that offer beers.
workaround: N/A

summary: Trivago
description: Integration with Trivago
workaround: NA

summary: Loc8 Near Me
description: Can you please add [https://loc8nearme.com/](https://loc8nearme.com/) to Yext's network?
workaround: NA

summary: The ability to push blank values for fields in GBP from Yext
description: Many times we see instances of data on GBP where clients or other users at one point wanted the field populated (for example, a delivery service or appointment service URL) \- but when that service is no longer present at the business, they want to clear the field.    Currently \- this is not possible to do via Yext. We can only supply a different value for the field \- but not actually clear the field.    It would be amazing to have the ability to clear / provide blank values for fields on GBP (and other publishers) via Yext!
workaround: Currently \- the only workaround is to manually clear the data in GBP. This is incredibly tedious \- and depending on scope, sometimes non\-viable!

summary: menu with pictures in gmb (synchro)
description: menu with pictures in gmb (synchro)
workaround: none

summary: Listing status to indicate an investigation in flight
description: The ability to surface/distinguish listings that are already being investigated either by the publisher, the publisher team, or support teams in the status. Right now we have live / opted out/ processing / unavailable. Particularly this last status can mean a multitude of things. A status like "investigation in progress " would indicate and assure end users that someone is working on the issue and therefore no further support ticket is needed to be submitted.
workaround: Exporting the unavailable listings to a spreadsheet, adding an additional notes column, and having a Yext agent annotate what listings are already under investigation vs not, and manually updating the spreadsheet as the situation changes.

summary: Remove URLs from Embedded Fields list / Knowledge Graph description
description: Remove URLs from Embedded Fields list in Knowledge Graph description.    One of the most common and usable Embedded Field is Website URL, that clients can easily pick and add to description from the Embedded Fields list. But because adding URL in location description text is against Google's guidelines \-\> location's Google Business Profile goes suspended and inactive. Client don't know / remember this rule or notice if GBP goes suspended. Getting client's GBP live again with Google's support takes time and effort from us.    If client adds embedded URL to description for maybe dozens of locations as bulk, it takes lots of time \& effort to get these GBP's live again and Google requires in some cases new verification codes or other document proofs to get listings live.    **Google Business Profile is the most important Yext listing at least for Finnish clients, so is it possible to remove URLs from Knowledge Graph location description Embedded Fields list to prevent this problem?**
workaround: Not available

summary: Ability to Edit Entities From Publisher Page
description: I often find myself needing to edit/ export all entities that are synced/processing/not synced to a certain publisher, but there is no option to edit from the Listings page. Currently you can only export them, and the fields are automatically selected for you. It would be helpful if we could select entities from the publisher page, and hit edit or export, exactly how we can in the knowledge graph. Even if the standard fields exported stayed the same, it would be nice if we could add a field when we need.
workaround: Currently if I need to edit the fields in bulk, I have to export the entities with the standard fields, then copy the Yext IDs as csv, then paste them back into the browser and add a label. Lot of time for something that could be a simple edit button!

summary: Search text for social posts in Knowledge API
description: Hi, my partner would like to be able to search their client in the Knowledge API 'Post: List' operation without specifying the full text of the post. Would it be possible to find all posts matching a search for a specific phrase or individual keywords?
workaround: None, the full text must currently be specified.

summary: Request to add opt-out functionality for social pubs like LinkedIn
description: Since only 1 LinkedIn company page can be linked for a business that leaves multiple unlinked location entities in multi\-locations accounts. It would be great to have the option to opt out of the other locations that will not be connected to LinkedIn.
workaround: None

summary: Allow user to filter by "Status Details" when reviewing the listings
description: Allow user to filter by "Status Details" when reviewing the listings
workaround: The only workaround I can think of would be to create a label (however if you have many listings that would require extra work such as doing a file upload) while getting the filter can make the unavailable listing on top straightaway

summary: Listings | GBP/FB Brand Settings | Location Group / Brand Page IDs reset
description: Hi,   This idea is mainly onboarding oriented.   When we add a new GBP location group or FB brand page in Listings/Publishers/GBP or FB Brand Setttings as a Yext employee, we can fill the ID.
