It would be valuable to have pre\-selected fields\-\-with the option to add fields as needed\-\-that are specific to an industry and recommended based on entity type.
workaround: The current workaround is to collapse field sections, but there are limitations to this.

summary: Toggle Sort Options for Entity Relationship Field Lists
description: Entities linked within an entity relationship field are currently sorted by entity IDs, however for customers with a large numbers of relationships they may need to manually review those linkages. To make these reviews easier, it would be helpful to add an option to toggle between sorting by entity ID or by entity name.
workaround: n/a

summary: TEMPLATES - Add data to already existing content instead of replacing it
description: When you apply a template it replaces the already existing values of the regarding fields.    For example:    1. You want to add holiday hours for an entity.    2. The entity already has 'special opening hours' at some holidays that you have entered before.    3. Now the problem: enabling the template overrides the exiting special opening hours and replaces them with the new values of the template.    We got several hundred locations and many of them have different 'special opening hours'. We have to add holiday hours for all locations (differing between different federal states) for 2024 (and 2025 and so on) but need to keep the existing special hours of each location.    *** ** * ** ***  Resolution: Implement the (optional) possibility to add data from a template, instead of completely replace existing data.
workaround: Watch up every single location, check if there are entered any special opening hours/holiday hours. If not, apply the template with the new holiday hours. If yes, note down the special dates, apply the template, re\-enter the special dates manually.

summary: Field Blocking Error
description: When the error "Another field on this entity has a blocking error" appears, the platform should tell you which field is providing the blocking error.
workaround: None \- you need to manually check fields

summary: Switch Entity within Entity Profile Screen
description: When editing the content for a particular entity, an admin may need to reference another entity and/or repeat changes made to another similar entity. Rather than having to go back to the main Content screen, it would be helpful to add drop down or other select option to toggle between various entities of the same entity type within the entity profile screen.
workaround: Return to Content screen and select other entity.

summary: Built-in Entity Type and Connector for Full Site Index
description: For any full site utilizing Yext Search, a 'links' vertical that includes a full index of the site is almost always needed. Currently, there isn't a built\-in entity type to store all crawled pages on a particular domain and the admin has to do a handful of transforms to ensure the Page IDs used for ingesting the full site, don't conflict with the page ids when ingesting content for specific verticals.    Recommend adding a more streamlined crawler/connector for ingesting the entirety of a site and storing it as a set of entities that represent the full site index.
workaround: Create connector and 'page' entity type

summary: Allowing subfields to be embedded fields in Yext Content
description: While we are able to embed most fields in Content, we are not able to do so for custom field types that have subfields. Dot notation does not work.
workaround: The current workaround is to create a separate custom fields that are not a custom field type. We then either have to use a file upload, connector, or the ETL to update this new field.

summary: Fotos ersetzen
description: Guten Morgen,    ich möchte einen Verbesserungsvorschlag einbringen. Es wäre super, wenn bei den Entitäten unter Fotos die Möglichkeiten bestehen würde, bestehende Fotos zu ersetzen. Aktuell kann ich Fotos hochladen und bestehnede Fotos löschen. Wenn unsere Vertreter/Vertreterinnen bei einem Fototermin waren, tausche ich die Fotos aus. Der Aufwand ist erhöht, weil ich das alte Foto löschen muß und das neue Foto hochlade. Daher mein Vorschlag, Fotos zukünftig zu ersetzen. Vielen Dank! Wenn Sie Fragen haben, schreiben Sie mich gern an. Freundliche Grüße aus Hannover! Jeannette Heinrich
workaround: NA

summary: Ability to white label Content & other sections of dashboard
description: Partners have the ability to whitelabel the Listings and Reviews sections of the Yext dashboard. It would be great if this also applied to the Content and other sections of the dashboard
workaround: None

summary: Full Entity Content Generation (for Marketing Derivatives)
description: The goal is to help marketing teams build derivative content at scale. For instance, take a core marketing asset — an ebook or a blog — and use that entity to create new entities that marketing teams need to publish and promote their content — such as a landing page, social post, email copy, etc..    ++Imagine we have:++  Entity A, ebook  Entity B, sample landing page  ++And we want to create:++    Entity C (a landing page based on Entity A, ebook)    First you provide the model with context: the JSON files for Entity A and Entity B. You then tell the model to create Entity C (a landing page for the ebook) using the content from Entity A (as context) and the configuration of Entity B.    In theory, you could be on the entity view page for an ebook asset, click a button that says something like "Generate a Derivative", see a drop down for the content/entity type "landing page, social post, outreach email, blog post, etc." (these CaC files being preset in the system) and click a button and have a net\-new entity available as a suggestion.
workaround: NA

summary: Geographical Entity Grouping: Drawing a Map Around a Geographical Area and Grouping Listings Within
description: For geographically\-relevant events, it would be nice to filter listings by drawing a map. Any listing with a pin in that map drawing would be grouped together. Especially helpful for Google Local Posts that are a result of a geographical event, such as hurricane or natural disaster. That's not something easily grouped by city/state filters.
workaround: NA

summary: Add Tikkie to payment options
description: Tikkie is a Dutch payment method that allows people to sent payment request through What'sapp.
workaround: NA

summary: Folders UI Update in Content to View Root Folder
description: Hi! For accounts that utilize a folder structure, we are not currently able to see entities clearly that are in the root/unfoldered. If you click the top level of the folder structure it shows all entities not just those at the root level.    Overall, it would be helpful to expand the folders section beyond the side bar too for adding/moving folders.
workaround: In order to find these we need to export all entities and review the folder=blank from the report.

summary: Bulk Edit Entities Field for Assets
description: Bulk Edit Entities Field for Assets
workaround: NA

summary: Provide Better User Experience for Dragging and Dropping Sortable Items in the Platform
description: I have some larger repeating custom field that powers my navigation. It has a bunch of sub navigations and items that make it a rather long field. If I want to rearrange my navigation (and thus move items around the custom field list) I have the option to drag and drop thanks to a handle in the platform. However when I pick it up by clicking the drag handle i just see an empty space, then as I drag it, scrolling up in my repeating fields It's hard to know where I am and if I am even moving anything because the indicators aren't clear.    It would be nice if the Drag and Drop interaction was better and along side that if Longer custom fields could be minimized into a sort of accordion so they can be easily moved    ![](https://cdn.loom.com/sessions/thumbnails/c399f4342f714834aac82399b8274e20\-with\-play.gif)
workaround: You can export the field, rearrange it in a spreadsheet and then reupload it but even that is complicated because the exported field is basically JSON that you would need to format and move around

summary: Bulk Update Individual Name Subfields in UI
description: Currently if users attempt to bulk update the Office name, a subfield of the Name field, for Healthcare Professional entity types, it errors out if the First Name and Last Name values aren't also being populated. This creates a poor user experience for healthcare clients as there are times where they want to bulk edit the Office Name of multiple professionals directly in the UI, but don't want to change the first and last name values (as they are completely different providerrs operating from the same location). The same behavior occurs if clients try to leverage templates as well and results in the entities erroring out.
workaround: Current workaround is to leverage spreadsheet uploading to bulk update this subfield.

summary: View Values for Dynamic Fields
description: If an admin inserts a dynamic field (e.g., ) within another field (e.g., description: "visit us at ") it's difficult to visualize the returned value unless you have a linked digital experience or API console.    It would be helpful to have a toggle option between the field name and the field value so an admin can easily ensure information is populating correctly.
workaround: View in front end / call API

summary: Additional Options for "Open Date" field
description: **Context:** Heartland Dental launches facilities based on "Open Date" and their offices only open on Fridays so that's the logic we use to launch. They also launch offices on Google 90 days in advance of their open date (on Google only).    **Idea:** Can we add an option for "Today" on the "Open Date" field so that when the day hits, the Open Date field changes to "Today". We would use this in Saved Filter License Assignment criteria.    i.e. if the open date was 8/4, when 8/4 rolls around that field would switch to saying "Today" and get launched    It also would be helpful to be able to filter around "Today" so for removals being able to filter that open date "is 30 days in the past" of "Today" or open date is "90 days from today"    Let me know if I can provide additional clarification here.
workaround: Manually launching \- hoping to use Saved Filter License Assignment.

summary: Allow custom roles to view assets
description: My client has custom roles for 100+ field end users but wants them to be able to use assets to fill in their store data. The custom role only has access to the group of stores in their region.  Having access to assets will define the brand\-approved images they can use without having our main Yext admin set up approvals for images.    This is also confusing for my client as you're able to check off management/editing/viewing of Assets under custom roles, but will only show up in Content if you have "full account" access.
workaround: No workaround \- only "full account" roles can view assets.

summary: Edit to Built In Degrees Field
description: I have a client who uses the built in degrees field and they are requesting an addition to the check list. They would like us to add "Licensed Dietitian\-Nutritionist (LDN)" to the list.
workaround: We could create a custom degrees field which would involve reuploading the data from the current degrees field, remapping the ETL to the new custom degrees field as well as updating the Search experience.

summary: Return to Entity After Completing an Action
description: After completing an action such as assigning/removing licenses or applying templates, have the option to "Return to Entity/Entities" instead of only "Return to Content."
workaround: Go back several times or start search over.

summary: Warning Banner in bulk upload for Entity ID's
description: Could we have a Warning banner appear in bulk upload if a bulk Entity ID change occurs?    We had many instances where Entity ID's were changed due to the leading zeros being removed by Excel and it messed up our ETLs.  The Banner would work in that when during a bulk upload entity IDs are going to be changed in bulk, a warning message appears and the user has to confirm in order to proceed with Bulk Entity ID change. This would prevent us from having a user accidentally change the IDs due to the excel removal of leading zeros.
workaround: No Workaround.

summary: Export New Rich Text Fields as Plain Text
description: When you export the rich text fields the data comes back in JSON and HTML. It would be great if there was a third option that exported the content also in plain text.
workaround: After you export, you have to find and replace the html or json via regex to clean up what comes back.

summary: Possibility to set up a (sticky) note for an entity for internal use
description: Our use case: By now we have more than 330 physical franchise locations which are represented online on different publisher listings like Google Business Profile, Apple Maps, Bing etc. Sometimes locations get a new franchisee or move to another address. In some cases there are construction works done nearby a location or there are important information about accounting and billing for the location.    It would be pretty helpful to set up a (sticky) note for an entity to not forget important information and to get a quick overview. And instead of taking notes in various excel lists and word documents it would be nice to have the info where they are needed: in the yext knowledge graph.    The note content could be set up in the "internal Use Only" section of the knowledge graph and the note itself could be displayed in the sidebar on the right side just under the entity summary for example. In the best case you can also search and filter for notes.
workaround: NA

summary: Set Limit for Entities Added to Folder Based On License Count
description: Hi team,    Our client asked if there was a way to limit the number of entities included in a folder based on a predefined limit of licenses they want to allocate to entities in that folder. Would this be possible?    Thank you!    Wilhelmina
workaround: Right now keeping track of this involves manual work.

summary: Facebook Fields > Facebook About
description: Add an info bubble with upper limits on character count, or provide 'characters remaining'.
workaround: Manually ensuring the character limit is not exceeded.

summary: Hours (Holiday Hours): Mark multiple days as "closed" at once
description: Task: you need to mark multiple days as closed for a single entity.    By now you have to select each single day (by date) to set it as "closed" separately. It would be nice, if it would be possible, to select multiple days at once.    Example: You want to set one entity/location "closed" for the whole week from 2023\-07\-24 until 2023\-07\-29. Now you have to got to the Hours (Holiday Hours) section and have to select Monday 2023\-07\-24 and select "closed". Then you have to select Tuesday 2023\-07\-25 and select "closed". Then you have to select Wednesday 2023\-07\-26 and select "closed". And so on.    Suggestion: Implement an option for selecting multiple days at once and set them "closed". For example with a pop\-up calendar, where you can select the specific days either by selecting each day separately or by selecting the beginning and the ending day for the "closed time period".
workaround: unknown / using bulk upload

summary: Add Links to Edit Custom Field Types From the edit screen of Custom Fields where they are used
description: Currently if a custom field is using a custom field type and a user tries to edit it they simply see a grayed out section with the name of the custom field type. If they would like to edit that custom field type they have to go back to the configuration language page, click into "entity types" and search for that custom field type and click it to get to the edit screen. It would be nice if, to save the user several steps, one could simply click a link on the custom field edit screen that took you directly to the edit screen of the custom field type.
workaround: The user has to remember the in use custom field type and find it manually

summary: Whitelabelling Yext Platfrom Navigation
description: Knowledge graph has been rebranded to Content. Partners would like to be able to whitelabel the name of this part of the platform similar to how they can whitelabel Listings and Reviews.

summary: Special opening hours for several locations
description: I wanted to change the opening hours for our offices just on certain days. When I chose all of our offices (more than 300) it was possible to add these special opening hours to the existing ones. But when I did this regarding just several of our locations (35 offices), I had to overwrite the existing special opening hours. Thats not really helpful. Thats why it would be nice to add the option to add special opening hours to the existing ones even if the number of chosen offices is low.

summary: Un-link phone number fields in Knowledge Graph
description: Can you un\-link phone number fields in Knowledge Graph so a user can edit the Main Phone only, while blocking others? Additional phone number fields are irrelevant for all our clients so it would be great if these fields could be hidden in Knowledge Graph but to keep Main Phone visible.

summary: Ability to Export available Google Attributes
description: At the moment there seems to be no way to export all gmb attributes available to each entity type if you do not fill it in.

summary: Un-link phone number fields in Knowledge Graph
description: Can you un\-link phone number fields in Knowledge Graph so a user can edit the Main Phone only, while blocking others? Additional phone number fields are irrelevant for all our clients so it would be great if these fields could be hidden in Knowledge Graph but to keep Main Phone visible.

summary: Adding subscriptions as an export data point
description: It would be very helpful to be able to include packages/subscriptions in entity exports. Often times our partners like to see what services each client has in an export.
workaround: Currently, you have to do an export for each subscription bundle (ex: Pro, Starter, Starter + KTags, Pro + HC...) and add in the package name as a new column before compiling all the exports into one excel file.

summary: Embedded field translations
description: Currently when embedded fields are used for multiple locales and the field is an option select field, the translations of the field configuration are not being pulled.
workaround: A workaround is to embed the field using {...} or \[...\] brackets and update the pages to look for those placeholders instead. In addition this allows for the translations to be pulled from the field configuration.

summary: Allow users with location/folder level access to bulk update via spreadsheet upload
description: Users with only location/folder level access are unable to make bulk updates via spreadsheet. Similar to how bulk uploads work at an account level, a user should have the ability to update content in bulk without having account level permissions.
workaround: * Reach out to Yext support to do it for you;    * Grant account level access to edit all fields in the account. Not quite feasible for teams that want to restrict access but allow autonomy.

summary: Search via country from quickfind
description: Hello,    A customer has asked if this would be something we could add.    It would be great to be able to use the quick find from the homescreen to search for all entities in a specific country, rather than using the filter. Currently if I search for a city via quick find it shows all entities in that country.    Thank you
workaround: Going into the KG and filtering via country. But this feature works for cities.

summary: Add Latitude/Longitude built-in fields to location-like entity types
description: Only the generic "location" entity type has built\-in fields for latitude and longitude. Customers have requested these fields for restaurant, ATM, healthcare facility, and hotel entity types as well. Connectors (e.g. Olo, GMB, etc) could then map automatically to these fields rather than creating custom ones.
workaround: Creating custom fields

summary: Conditional Fields on Knowledge Graph
description: It would be great if some fields only appeared conditionally so that these specific fields only appear when another field has a specific value.
workaround: N/A

summary: Archive entities instead of deleting
description: It would be useful having an "archive entities" option instead of only removing entities. Sometimes, for example, when we are cleaning up the account before starting a data migration, it would be useful having the possibility to archive the entities instead of deleting everything. This way, in case of mistakes, we can easily retrieve the entities and bring them back to the knowledge graph.
workaround: Right now, before any massive change to the platform, I download a backup copy of the KG in my pc so I can reupload the data in case of need.

summary: Show Stream Usage in KG UI
description: in the KG UI show which streams use a given field next to the field content
workaround: manual documentation and investigations

summary: Customizing Export Names
description: Hello,  The UI currently has exports set to the following: "name\-date\-epoch". Is it possible to remove the last set of unique numbers, so that the file name ends after the date?
workaround: NA

summary: Ability to Schedule Spreadsheet Uploads
description: Hi team,    We'd love to be able to schedule spreadsheet uploads via the Knowledge Graph for a specific date. The feature could include the following prompt:    When would you like to schedule this spreadsheet upload?    * Now    * For a future date (calendar view)    We think this feature would create a more streamlined and user\-friendly process for fields that may have a quick reversion time (think: updates during the holidays).
workaround: NA

summary: Wistia & Atlassian Status Page connectors
description: Hi there, I was wondering if adding these two connectors to the app directory was on the roadmap, or if there's anywhere else I could discuss adding these? Wistia (video hosting platform) \& Atlassian Status Page. Thanks for your insight!
workaround: NA

summary: Details on Updated entities on Connector
description: Since the Account is heavy, we are unable to do bulk uploads and are instead using File Upload Connectors to replace it, as is the intention of the connector. However on the Connector whilst there are details on the Update (from the Fall release), you are unable to view details on what field exactly was changed through the dry run of connector on the details.  This means we are not able to check if the update is being done as expected before approving the change, as there is no option to do so on the connector, like on the bulk upload.  When using the bulk upload, the Summary screen is often used to double check if the updates that are done are being done as expected and acts an additional layer of security to not make incorrect changes that would be detrimental for the client. So if we could have the same kind of detail on the connector we would be able to avoid any issues where fields that are not meant to be updated, are updated.
workaround: N/A

summary: More Specificity Around Product using a Saved Filter
description: In the Manage Filter Screen an admin can view which product(s) are utilizing a particular saved filter, however they can't see which specific experience(s) (e.g., which search experience/vertical, which site, etc.) and how many experiences are utilizing the filter.    This can make it difficult to understand the impacts that changing filters/the entities within a filter would have on a particular experience. For search, most customers utilizing a different search engine today are familiar with viewing their various search "indexes" based on what data is in\-scope for a particular app which is also difficult with the current setup.
workaround: Go into each search experience and/or Pages and check.

summary: Add holiday hours as a field in entity history
description: Hi team,    Can we look at adding holiday hours into the entity history?    This would be helpful to understand who is populating holiday hours.    Thanks,    Laura
workaround: Currently I am filtering "field with data = holiday hours" to see if the client has added hours, but I cannot check out of the ones that have been populated, who actioned in

summary: Adding User permissions on Content Generation
description: Could we please add the ability to restrict who is able to use the "wand" / generate content depending on the user permission as not all users should have the ability to be able to change the content there as sometimes the main user will generate content and then manual adjustments. If another user clicks on the wand again there is a risk that it will be overwritten with "new" content.
workaround: N/A

summary: Implement ability to switch on/off automated content generation at account and field level
description: This will help better manage generated word usage \- often re\-computations are not needed, or could easily be made manually if a dynamic field input value changes \- to avoid generation 'wastage'.    Being able to turn generation on and off more easily at the account level could be useful, or even more helpful would be the ability to either:    1. Toggle auto\-generation of computed fields on and off (when dynamic field inputs are updated)    2. Enable a pop\-up option \- 'a field input has changed \- do you want to re\-generate affected computed fields?' with a tick box of all the field that could be re\-generated for selection \- with choice of choosing some, all or none.
workaround: There isn't really a viable workaround \- you'd need to remove the dynamic inputs to stop auto\-generation, add them back in when needed for future generation (then remove them again afterward to stop re\-generation if fields are updated)

summary: Include linked account history in historical exports
description: Is there any way where we'd be able to include linked account history for Yelp/Facebook/Google/etc for historical exports? We've had a few cases where a user has accidentally linked the wrong account for locations, and being able to access the linked account history would be super helpful in reverting these user errors (especially helpful for partners with accounts structured w/ the enhanced dashboard).
workaround: NA

summary: Add New Field to Knowledge Graph for Permanently Closed Entities
description: Create a new field in KG, similar to Temporarily Closed that allows clients to easily identify that field to Permanently Closes an entity. A clear, identified field can help lessen the confusion of the "Internal Use Only \- Closed" field. Potentially add a Tool Tip to help clients toggle the field to "No" if location is still showing as Closed.
workaround: At the moment, clients have to navigate to the "Internal Use Only \- Closed' field to mark an entity as Closed. Due to the naming convention of this field, most clients are confused or unaware unless explicitly told by CSM and Support.

summary: Ability to create new label on the entity bulk upload screen
description: When you want to add a new label on the entity upload screen, you have to go back to entities and create a new label and then refresh the entity upload page. It would be great if we had the ability to create new labels on the entity upload page itself.
workaround: See above

summary: Upload to Knowledge Graph from Google Sheets
description: Would love to be able to upload to Knowledge Graph directly from Google Sheets. Currently I have to export the Google Sheet to .xlsx or .csv, but it would be nice if I could link my Google account and just skip that extra step.
workaround: Export sheet to .csv or .xlsx then upload

summary: Error for Incompatible Letters and Characters in CSVs when Uploading Files
description: When uploading files to either add or edit entities in Yext, you can use a csv or excel file. Some letters and characters won't upload properly with a csv such as é. In these cases, � will show up instead. To prevent this, you must use an excel file for these cases.    We should create an error for the "Fix Errors" step in the process for any fields in the file with a letter or symbol not compatible with a csv. This error should allow users to manually correct this or include clear verbiage that explains how this can be resolved by using an excel file instead of a csv.
workaround: You have to be fully aware that your file contains these characters and then ensure you use an excel file instead of a csv.

summary: New Entity Export/Import to Allow Multiple Multi-line Values

This would be a huge boost to helping new clients get set up faster or completing spreadsheet based expansions.

Currently I can only setup Entity Previews on an account level. For our partner portal this we will have to setup 30K separate Entity Previews per account.

Wasted time on the 1st challenge because of this.

For example, if a user was uploading multiple entities that were going to be placed in one of three different folders, they would have to do three separate bulk uploads, meaning they would need three different files as well.

summary: Add Country Code to Telephone Number

However, if you integrate the information from the KG into your website, the country code disappears. Hence, if you klick on the displayed phone number from outside of the country, you will not be able to reach the number as the country code is nowhere.    Therefore, it would be crucial for the country code to be integrated in all platforms which take the information from the KG.    Many thanks for your consideration.
workaround: NA

summary: Active on Answers = Unspecific, Saved Filtering Capabilitiy

This way we can cut down on significant lift to build out a sandbox that would reflect production.    Export a location entity configuration with all the fields added and be able to take that file and upload it in another account.    Export field custom fields with all the settings to be uploaded in another account.

summary: Make entity upload to be able to set regular hours flag
description: Currently, we are unable to set regular hours flag via entity upload, please implement this feature!    When exporting and then uploading an entity with regular hours holiday hours, it exports a holiday hour value that is the same as the value of the field, but when re\-uploading it "regular hours" does not work.
workaround: NA

summary: knowledge assistant
description: Please enable Knowledge Assistant for Japanese environment.
workaround: No workaround. No option to use your smartphone to operate Yext, but your laptop.

summary: Support semi-colon separated CSV files in uploads
description: Depending on the language settings used by a user's machine, the default separator for CSV files can either be a comma or a semi\-colon. In German and Dutch (and probably other language) the default is semi\-colon.    When these users try to use our bulk upload functionality or our review invitation import functionality their CSV files tend to be invalid, as their system saves them with semi\-colons by default.    The request is for us to support semi\-colon as a separator as well as comma.
workaround: The work around is to save the file with a comma as a separator, but many of our users aren't familiair with how to do this.

summary: Export Linked Entity Names
description: When exporting linked entities, only the Entity ID and Yext ID of the linked entity are able to be exported. Can we make it so that you can export fields on the linked entity directly, most importantly the name of that entity?
workaround: Vlookup names against an export of the linked entities

summary: Support for Linked Entities in Computed Fields for Content Generation
description: Hi team, the ability to include information from linked entities in computed fields for content generation would be incredibly useful, particularly for my hospital system.
workaround: Store information from the linked entity on the target entity itself.

summary: allow filtering on struct fields
description: allow in the Knowledge Graph entity search filtering on struct fields like price.
workaround: NA

summary: Add Revert Changes Functionality to Entity History UI
description: Currently, each Operation under the Entity History screen has an option to "Restore Changes". It would be valuable to have an option to revert the changes done in that Operation. Reverting the change should return the field's content to the value **before** the selected operation.    Services + Support need to revert data that is displaying incorrectly on the Pages.
workaround: Currently, we are limited to pulling a historical data export for the relevant fields and uploading it back into the platform. This is also only limited to the last 30 days. If we need to revert to content prior to that date then we might have to use Development work.    This can sometimes be tedious and it is hard to do so in a quick turnaround time, which is often needed.

summary: Add AND/OR logic to Filters
description: Currently, Filter logic uses AND logic between each item and OR logic within each item.    For example, let's say we are filtering off of two fields \-\- label and folder. If we set label to "A" and "B" in the filter and folder to "US" and "Canada", the logic would be:  (Labels contain "A" OR Labels contain "B" OR Labels contain "A" and "B") AND (Folder = "US" OR Folder = "Canada")    However, there are other combinations that are not possible. Some examples are:  \- (Labels contain "A" OR Labels contain "B" OR Labels contain "A" and "B") OR (Folder = "US" OR Folder = "Canada")  \- (Label contains "A" and Folder = "US") OR (Label contains "B" and Folder = "Canada")    By giving more options for structuring AND/OR logic throughout a filter, it'll be easier to find relevant entities in the Knowledge Graph and we will have more opportunities with the saved filter functionality.
workaround: There's no real workaround that has the same effect; we just have to be more broad in our filter criteria.

summary: Export & Upload Templates
description: Hi Team,    It would be great if there was an option to export and upload a template's configuration i.e., field names and associated values, for ease of editing and sharing.    Thanks!
workaround: You can do the following if you need to update a bunch of fields at once on a template:    * Create a test entity    * Apply the existing template    * Export that entity    * Update everything you need to update in the sheet    * Upload that back to the test entity    * Copy data from the test entity to the template and save it    * Delete the test entity    But this gets very cumbersome with multiple templates.

summary: Included entity details in file upload summary
description: Hi Team!    When going through the file upload process our clients have expressed that when they go through that summary section they would like to click into see the list of the exact entities that they are updated. This would help them feel more comfortable with the upload process since we are trying to become self service.    best,    Wilhelmina
workaround: Referring to the original file and trusting the process.

summary: If/Then Built Into Platform
description: Add the ability to use if/then "Rules" to accomplish actions in the platform based on preset criteria.    Example:    If Closed is set to "Yes", then move to Closed Folder    If Custom Field = X, then apply the "X" label    If field contains X, mark X field as "Yes"
workaround: Honestly believe that this would help clients with smaller teams or teams with limited time be able to create complex workflows that would take care of multiple step, important, actions without having to remember a list of to\-dos each time they need to make an update to entities.

summary: Add Xing URL to the Social Media fields in Knowledge Graph
description: ``` XING is a career\-oriented social networking site, highly used in the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland) region. Currently it has almost 21 million users (in DACH). It is the German equivalent of LinkedIn and its main competitor in the region.  Therefore, we would like to add and be able to submit Xing URL to the Social Media fields in KG. Some of the publishers that do support the XING URL submission are: Acompio, Cylex, Dialo, Finderr, Hotfrog, MeineStadt, Ortsdienst, Stadtbranchenbuch, WhereTo and Wogibtswas.  ```
workaround: NA

summary: Better filter logic options, especially for Binary (Yes/No) Fields, to reduce data cleanup overhead
description: Unlike advanced CMS or CRMs, Yext is very restrictive in how the Yes/No field can be used for filter. Critically, it does not allow "Exclude where field X = Yes" which is an issue for a lot of Answers/Search clients.    Ideally Yext should provide the following options:    * "Is equals to" or "Is not equals to" Yes/No (similar to multi\-option select)    * Enable advanced logic as offered by platforms like MS Dynamics e.g.     * EITHER Field Y = Yes     * OR Field X contains Data
workaround: None \- you have to either mass update and check all entities (which is a pain for a major client with thousands of locations across various markets), or create separate filters which is a limitation as one Search vertical can only be associated with one filter.

summary: Export Text Assets
description: My client wishes to export Assets, in particular, Text Assets.
workaround: NA

summary: Export assets
description: My client wants to export all their assets from the KG but can't because we don't support it yet.
workaround: Manually click into each image \-\> click view more \-\> right click and save picture.

summary: Add more advanced filtering to Knowledge Graph
description: **Issue:** Currently in KG, there are certain limitations to what we can filter on. The most common one I've seen is trying to filter on Booleans.    For example, trying to find all open entities using the "Closed" field. The Closed field is a Boolean type but there are effectively 3 values: Unset, Yes, and No. When you try to find all "open" entities, you will be looking for entities where "Closed != Yes" but that is not a filter option so you have to make two searches in order to find all desired entities: "Fields Without Data: Closed" and "Closed == No"    If you combine those two filtering options in the same search, you will only see "Fields Without Data: Closed" entities and not "Closed == No" entities.    **Proposed Solution:** Change the filtering for Booleans from a "Yes/No" radio button to a dropdown with "Is" and "Is Not", similar to Single Option Select fields.
workaround: Perform two separate searches and do what you need to do twice.

summary: Bulk Uploading to Assets Feature
description: I've had several customers ask if we can bulk upload images, videos, or text to the Asset feature within the Knowledge Graph. They also have mentioned how it seems counterintuitive if we can bulk edit entities to add images but we cannot bulk upload those same images to the assets feature to then push into their entities.
workaround: Manually 1 by 1 or an API

summary: Knowledge Graph - Add the ability to "exclude" entities matching a criteria
description: Knowledge Graph search filtering should have the ability to "exclude" all entities that match a given criteria in the filter. Current options for filtering in the Knowledge Graph include:    * Data Exists    * Data Does Not Exist    * Field contains    * Field = Yes/No    **Use Case:**    Exempt all entities from a filter where "Active on Answers" = No.
workaround: No workaround exists without needing to modify the data in Knowledge Graph to match the limited criteria available

summary: Ability to use dynamic date field within filters
description: Particularly for Event entities, data needs to be removed from Answers once the date has been passed. Instead of having to select a static date, it would be helpful to have a dynamic date to select that represents today's date (similar to what excel has when a user enters '=today') for building more flexible filters.
workaround: This can be done with filters but the current options only allow for before, after, etc. a static date

summary: Functionality to only export fields with data
description: Having a subset or a functionality on Entity export which allows you to export only fields that have data would be very useful for data uploads to make going through the data on excel will be much easier and faster \- without the necessary data columns not being used.
workaround: N/A

summary: Bulk Uploading Tooltip (and translation of it)
description: I have a client which needs to upload tooltips for several fields. As there is no way to do this in bulk I am going to have to upload these individually along with adding the translations manually one by one.
workaround: Manual adding

summary: Removing Past Events
description: When the date of an event passes there's not an automated way to get those events out of a Saved Filter and/or completely removed from your KG. It would be great if there was a way to have "Active in Answers" or Saved Filter automatically remove events with a date in the past OR enable the Comprehensive Run for a Connector to remove entities that don't meet particular criteria (e.g., an event is past due)
workaround: Manual intervention

summary: Referencing a list for data validation of fields
description: When creating a data validation for a field, each item has to be manually added one by one. It would be helpful if we could reference a list (maintained in something like a Google Doc) or if we can upload a file via the data upload to populate the data validation.
workaround: Manually one\-by\-one.

summary: Bulk Upload Custom Fields
description: It would be great to have a tool on the custom fields page to create custom fields in bulk. This would reduce the need to create each custom field manually during implementation and on an ongoing basis for our customers and internal teams!
workaround: Manually create each custom fields or configure in bulk via API

summary: Bulk Editing Custom Field List Type with Item Count Over 50
description: I recently ran into an account that had a custom List Field type (list setting subfield type photo) for a large amount of images, 64 to be exact. The client asked Support to have 2 of these images from this field removed from all of the entities in their account. We were unable to edit this due to the inability to bulk edit list fields with an item count exceeding 50, hence the idea submission.    We are currently only able to delete all of the items in list fields or add new ones, not remove specific individual images. Changing this limit to 100 would allow several accounts to do something as simple as removing one image via bulk\-edit straight from their account instead of doing so through a spreadsheet export \& re\-upload with the edit being done in excel. Escalated ticket link [here](https://yexttest.atlassian.net/browse/TECHOPS\-4514) for reference. Custom field link [here](https://www.yext.com/s/1225173/account/customFields/203729) for reference as well.
workaround: Current workaround is to edit the images for one entity, export this custom field, and apply it to all other entities that require this same data via excel spreadsheet upload.

summary: Option to configure an or option in KG Filters
description: Currently in Knowledge Graph Filters when I want to filter by fields the only option AND. Meaning only an entity that fits all of the filters criteria shows.    For example, we have multiple answers experience with different entities and we use the "Active on Answers 1" and "Active on Answers 2" Yes/No Filters to power our answers config filters. If I come across the scenario where I'd like to show an entity if it's Active on Answers 1 OR active on Answers 2, it isn't possible
workaround: The current workaround is for someone to check both of these fields for the entities, another option would be to completely refactor our use of Active on Answers and use the field with or without data filter.

summary: Bulk editing over 50 keywords for multiple locations
description: At the moment, editing over 50 Keywords is available for us only by editing single location (max. 100 keywords). But when we try to bulk edit multiple locations (that have exact same keywords), editing is not available if there are over 50 keywords. Existing keywords will collapse together and we can only delete those all or / and add new ones, we can't edit one or couple keywords.    Here's example screenshot view of bulk editing over 50 keywords view in Yext Knowledge Graph. It's possible only to delete all or add new ones, not editing existing keywords.    ![0](data:image/png;base64,)
workaround: Edit keywords separately for single locations or load updated keywords with Excel

summary: Using "Is Not" logic for Yes/No Fields
description: Within Knowledge Graph, have an option for "Is" or "Is Not" for yes/no fields. Currently it just allows you to pick yes or no but sometimes you need the inverse like looking building filters that exclude entities marked as "yes" for 'Exempt from ETL'.
workaround: Current workaround is to use fields without data and then include exempt from etl since it is usually unspecified and then set to No. Unfortunately this opens us to error and requires that the client is very aware that they can't mark anything as no because that will run the advanced filter we've built for exports.

summary: Entity Template on Knowledge Graph
description: Hi there,   I am re\-posting my product request here. When going to add a new entity, the content they have already inputted into the modal of the new entity gets erased after selecting a template.  For example, type AAA into name field and apply template which only has categories, name field gets cleared away. If this is expected functionality, we suggest to either   1. content remains even after selecting the template to apply (**preferred**) 2. place template at the top so people select the template at first before typing anything in the box   Thank you!  Kotoko
workaround: apply template before you add anything into the field

summary: Upload future opening hours
description: to upload upcoming opening hours. For customers with locations which will have different opening hours in that period.

summary: Bulk Upload Text Assets
description: It would be great to have the ability to upload text assets within the platform via Excel Upload, similarly to how we can upload entity data to KG via Excel Upload. It would also be helpful to quickly drag and drop the order of these text assets, as we can now do to an entity's fields in the Configuration subtab.An example use\-case for this would be whenever a Reviews client wishes to upload Review Response text assets into their asset library. Currently within KG's Assets subtab, users have the ability to upload text assets manually one\-by\-one, which can be very time\-consuming for a client that would want to upload 20+ text responses.The order of these text assets has also been a pain point in the past, as clients prefer to have assets in a certain order when using our asset library for Review Response. Clients don't initially realize that the order they input text assets within the platform will be the order in which they appear in their asset library.
workaround: Users have to manually create text assets one by one when uploading them into the platform. Regarding the order of the text assets, they are organized in order of last updated, so a user would either have to delete and reupload the text assets in the desired order, or strategically update certain assets so that they appear in the desired order (since they're organized from last updated).

summary: Ability to Export Suggestions to CSV

When doing this for multiple Entities the Entity Type is needed, which needs to be the API Name not Entity Name. However when doing a bulk export, the API Name cannot be exported and instead it is merely the Entity Type name.

summary: Entity History Export

summary: Change country name from “Turkey” to “Türkiye”

summary: Changing Country when adding a single entity leads to all fields being cleared
description: Currently, when adding entities individually via the Knowledge Graph, the "Additional Settings" fields contain a country selection.    When the fields above this country selector dropdown are populated, they are irreversibly cleared out a soon as the country is changed.    In my mind, it would make more sense to have the country selection as one of the first fields to be defined when adding an individual entity, since this would prevent the information in these fields from being deleted.
workaround: In my mind, the current solution is to work from the bottom up and to start in the additional settings, which is not optimal UX.

summary: Export Based on Streams
description: It would be awesome to create an export based on Stream definition, either ad\-hoc, Saved, or Saved + Scheduled. In accounts with complex relationships (Products + Inventory + Stores, Healthcare Taxonomy, etc) getting the data out in a "flattened" fashion is useful!
workaround: None that I'm aware of.

summary: Approvals and Suggestions
description: Ask: If a KG field remains unchanged for 12 months, it should automatically submit for review 2 weeks ahead of the approved date +1 year (expiration date).  \- I am not sure if this is just for the fields that currently route today, or ALL fields but will get confirmation on that.    * This ask is for a wealth management business that needs it for compliance reasons
workaround: Unknown . Manually querying / searching for previous approval fields

summary: Duplicating entities in the KG
description: **Idea:** Recommending the addition of a functionality in the KG to duplicate an existing entity retaining info in fields that remain constant across an entity with multiple locations (multiple locations for one entity requiring creation of additional entities for every location). To avoid true duplicates, the duplication process can require updates to certain fields like address, phone number, and entity id.    **Use Case:** Healthcare clients often have multiple entities for one provider as providers tend to practice at multiple locations. This product feature would facilitate creating additional entities for providers when they add additional practice locations. This would improve data integrity across all the provider's entities and streamline the process for both the client support team and the client when adding in an additional entity for an additional location the provider practices at.
workaround: As a workaround, we currently export the existing provider entity in Yext, keep provider specific info constant and change certain fields to match the provider's additional location (i.e. address, phone, fax, geomodifier, custom fields such as handicap accessible/public transportation availability, etc)/assign a unique entity id, and upload into the KG via file upload. This process can be more efficient and simplified with the proposed product feature in addition to enabling the client to complete the entity duplication easily themselves in the platform at any time.

summary: Content Filter to look at Alternate Language Field Values
description: When creating React Pages on the New Pages Platform, Slug values are necessary for Page Generation and to return Pages URL via a urlWriteback function triggered by URL Change.  In order to stop Page Generation Errors, we want to be able to filter out Entities that have blank values for Slugs. (ie the Slug Manager failed to input Slug values into new Entities) We want to make sure the Slug field is filled in for all the Entities due for Page Generation, as Page Generation takes a while, and if there are any Entities missing the Slug value, the whole Deploy fails.    TLDR: Allow Entity Filters to look at all the Fields in all Language Profiles, and be able to Filter out Field values based on the different Profiles.    Example:   1. Filter set to find all Entities with Field A that are blank in any Language Profile    2. Filter set to find all Entities with Field A that are blank in all Language Profiles 3. Filter set to find all Entities with Field A that are blank in specific Language Profiles
workaround: Export all the Entities and use the filter function in Excel to catch Slug/Pages URL that are blank by using the =ISBLANK() function.

summary: Template Shouldn't Erase Entity Content on Single Entity Creation
description: When creating a single entity the Template action is at the bottom of the modal (under Additional Settings). But if you've already filled out the required fields and then apply a template, all the data entered is cleared out. This seems like a bug.    Alternatively, if it's intentional, then the Template action should be at the top of the modal so users don't fill out data that's then erased.
workaround: NA

summary: エンティティ履歴
description: Content＞設定＞エンティティ履歴    ・エンティティ履歴をCSVでダウンロードできるようにして欲しい    ・現在、表示件数が100件までになっているが1000件などに増やして欲しい    ・絞り込みをした際に総数を表示して欲しい

summary: Knowledge Assistant - More Specific Entity Identification
description: It would be helpful if a message from Knowledge Assistant used more robust identifiers for entities, such as Entity IDs. The message mentions the entity name and the city, but if there are multiple entities in the same city with the same name, it's hard to tell which entity the message is referring to.

summary: Remove entities from linked service directly

summary: Editing Categories
description: Hi Team,    One of our clients had an idea that we should allow clients to suggest edits to categories directly within the platform. Another thought is that they could update categories for any entity that was not live on listings and then after that needed to suggest edits through the platform to be approved by Yext.    What do you think?    Wilhelmina
workaround: Currently clients have to work through Yext to update categories.

summary: Holiday Hours Enhancement
description: It would be great if we could show the name of the holiday when we are closed. Similar to how GMB lists the name of the holiday when a business is closed, it would be so helpful if the locator would show the name of the holiday when it marks that a business is closed. Currently, we input our holiday hours for the year, but if you are within the week that the holiday falls and look at one of our locations, it just says closed. So, if that holiday falls on a Friday, it will look at though we are closed on Fridays. Of course, once that day passes, it updates to the normal hours. But it can be confusing for customers and employees.
workaround: There is no current workaround. The Yext team is helping me implement an alert banner on our pages that will show up on holidays, but there is no workaround for the locator listings.

summary: GBP Video Thumbnail Generator: Downloading GBP Listing Images and Creating Video Slideshows
description: Utilizing videos, especially at\-scale for enterprise accounts, is very important for drawing visitors to click on your Google Business Profile listing. We need a way to download about 5 images from each of our GBP listings, turn them into a slideshow video, and then upload as video. This is difficult for us to do manually with 6000 hotels.
workaround: NA

summary: Make All Publisher Override Fields Available as Profile Fields
description: Currently, some fields available in Sync Settings are available as Profile Fields (Google Website Override), while others require the creation of a Custom Field (Facebook Website Override).    It'd be great if there was consistency in the field types used in [publisher override configuration](https://hitchhikers.yext.com/tracks/listings/lis105\-syncing\-listings\-with\-knowledge\-graph/02\-configure\-data\-to\-listings/) (profile rather than custom custom), and if these profile fields could be enabled under entity configuration.    A specific use case where this would be incredibly helpful is during entity transfers or account restructures when entities are moved between accounts.    When entities are transferred, profile fields move with the entity. However, custom fields and their data do not transfer over. This means that when an entity is transferred and it has a publisher override sync setting enabled that relies on a custom field, the following steps must be taken:    1. Create custom field in destination account    2. Configure publisher settings in destination account    3. Opt entity out of publisher in source account    4. Transfer entity to destination account (keeping all other listings synced)    5. Upload custom field data in destination account    6. Opt entity in to publisher (making sure to keep sync matches)
workaround: N/A

summary: Add a field that pushes services to Yelp using the list of services available in Yelp to select
description: Can we get a field created that allows us to select services that mirror services available in Yelp for our veterinary hospitals? I can provide a screenshot of the services that offer for selection.
workaround: No work around, we have to manually go into Yelp to add services because nothing gets pushed to Yelp and there are no existing fields.

summary: Re-Folder Entities During Removal Process
description: When removing licenses from inside the knowledge graph, you are prompted with the following questions:    1. Are the selected entities permanently closed?    2. Would you like to update their business hours and flag the entities as closed?    3. We recommend keeping closed entities on service for some period of time to ensure your customers know this entity is closed. Would you like to keep Yext services?    Based on your answer to #2, Yext can automatically update your entity's hours and closure status. Typically with removals, we also move entities to a "Closed" or "Inactive" folder. However, this has to be done manually and is not part of the license removals flow. Adding a prompt about changing folders that would automatically re\-folder the entity for you would be helpful and would decrease the chances of entities accidentally staying in an active folder. Clients on self\-serve removals would also appreciate everything for the removal being done in one process.
workaround: Currently, you must manually change the folder for an entity outside of the license removal process.

summary: Add "Other" Type to the Rich Text Field "Link Type" Option
description: The "Insert Link" button for the **++Rich Text++** field currently allows for the following types:   * URL, Phone, Email   We should support the "Other" *Link Type* option \- the same one that is currently available within the built\-in **++CTA++** field.   To provide a concrete example of where this would be helpful:   * I am currently using an RTF (rich text field) to advertise/link out to a campaign page on my website * I want to easily be able to preview my campaign page across several domain names (production, staging, and preview environments) * As such, it would be ***much* *easier*** to power this link with a relative URL like "++/campaign++", instead of "++https://\[insert domain\]/campaign++"
workaround: Current workaround is to store one absolute URL in the RTF field at a time, and then manually switch the value depending on which environment I want to be viewing the page from.

summary: Show actor in activity logs for scheduled updates
description: Currently when a user schedules an update in the platform, once the update is being made the actor in the activity log will show 'Yext'.    Instead it would be great to have a distinction here with something like 'Yext \- Laura via scheduled updates'.
workaround: The workaround for clients is to check with someone at Yext who can then see who made the initial update in admin.

summary: Kentico connector
description: It would be great to build out a few common connectors for Kentico CMS.
workaround: ETL

summary: Generate FAQ Entities from Google FAQs
description: An App that pulls Google Q\&A from the Knowledge API and creates FAQ entities
